vyāpin oṃ arūpa oṃ pramatha oṃ tejaḥ oṃ jyotiḥ oṃ puruṣa oṃ agne oṃ adhūma oṃ abhasma oṃ anādi oṃ nānā oṃ dhūdhū oṃ bhūḥ oṃ bhuvaḥ oṃ svaḥ anidhana nidhanodbhava śiva śarva paramātman maheśvara mahādeva sadbhāveśvara mahātejaḥ yogādhipataye muñca prathama sarva sarvesarveti dvātriṃśat padāni vījabhāve trayo mantrā vāmadevaḥ śivaḥ śikhā //AP_85.013cd/ gāndhārī ca suṣumṇā ca nāḍyau dvau mārutau tathā /AP_85.014ab/ samānodānanāmānau rasanāpāyurindriye //AP_85.014cd/ rasastu viṣayo rūpaśabdasparśarasā guṇāḥ /AP_85.015ab/ maṇḍalaṃ vartulaṃ tacca puṇḍarīkāṅkitaṃ sitaṃ //AP_85.015cd/ svapnāvasthāpratiṣṭhāyāṃ kāraṇaṃ garuḍadhvajaṃ /AP_85.016ab/ pratiṣṭhāntakṛtaṃ sarvaṃ sañcintya bhuvanādikaṃ //AP_85.016cd/ sūtraṃ dehe svamantreṇa praviśyaināṃ viyojayet /AP_85.017ab/ oṃ hāṃ khīṃ hāṃ pratiṣṭhākalāpāśāya oṃ phaṭ svāhāntenānainaiva pūrakeṇāṅkuśamudrayā samākarṣet tataḥ oṃ hāṃ hrūṃ hrāṃ hrūṃ(1) pratiṣṭhā kalāpāśāya hrūṃ phaḍityanena saṃhāramudrayā kumbhakena hṛdayādadho nāḍī-[!!!]

sūtrādādāya oṃ hāṃ hrūṃ hrāṃ hāṃ(1) pratiṣṭhākalāpāśāya nama ity anenodbhavamudrayā recakena kumbhe samāropayet oṃ hāṃ hrīṃ pratiṣṭhākalāpāśāya nama ity anenārcayitvā sampūjya svāhāntenāhutīnāṃ trayeṇa sannidhāya tataḥ oṃ hāṃ viṣṇave nama iti viṣṇumāvāhya sampūjya santarpya
oṃ hāṃ haṃ hoṃ hrūṃ phaṭ(3)

:e ity ādimahāpurāṇe āgneye nirvāṇadīkṣāyāṃ pratiṣṭhākalāśodhanaṃ nāma pañcāśītitamo 'dhyāyaḥ ||

oṃ namaḥ śivāya sarvaprabhave haṃ śivāya(2) īśānamūrdhāya tatpuruṣavaktrāya aghorahṛdayāya vāmadevaguhyāya(3) sadyojātamūrtaye(4) oṃ namo namo guhyātiguhyāya goptre anidhāya sarvādhipāya(5) jyotirūpāya prameśvārāya bhavena oṃ vyoma

vyomavyāpine vyomavyāpyarūpāya(2) sarvavyāpine śivāya anantāya anāthāya anāśritāya dhruvāya śāśvatāya yogapīṭhasaṃsthitāya nityayogine dhyānāhārāyeti(3) dvādaśapādāni
oṃ hauṃ(2) śāntikalāpāśāya haḥ hūṃ phaṭ
oṃ hāṃ īśvara buddhyahaṅkārau śulkaṃ gṛhāṇa svāhā
:e ity ādimahāpurāṇe āgneye nirvāṇadīkṣāyāṃ śāntiśodhanaṃ nāma saptaśītitamo 'dhyāyaḥ ||

oṃ hūṃ(1) śivatattvāya namaḥ / oṃ hūṃ(2) śivatattvādhipataye rudrāya namaḥ / oṃ hāṃ vidyātattvāya namaḥ / oṃ hāṃ(3) vidyātattvādhipāya(4) viṣṇave namaḥ / oṃ hāṃ ātmatattvāya
lūṃ rūṃ śūṃ pūṃ vūṃ yūṃ mūṃ hūṃ kṣūmiti(10)

:e ity ādimahapurāṇe āgneye vāstupūjākathanaṃ nāma trinavatitamo 'dhyāyaḥ ||

oṃ hāṃ śaktitattvāya nama ity ādi(11) / oṃ hāṃ śaktitattvādhipāya(12) nama ity ādi / oṃ hāṃ kṣmāmūrtaye

oṃ hūṃ hraṃ(3) kriyāśaktaye namaḥ / oṃ hūṃ hrāṃ haḥ(4) mahāgaurī rudradayite svāheti ca(5) piṇḍikāyāṃ / oṃ hāṃ(6) ādhāraśaktaye namaḥ / oṃ hāṃ vṛṣabhāya namaḥ
umā mohā kṣamā nityā mṛtyurmāyābhayājvarā iti ja.. :p

o hāṃ vāṃ āṃ oṃ āṃ ṣāṃ oṃ bhūṃ bhūṃ vā(1) vahnimūrtaye namaḥ
evaṃ sadyojātāya oṃ hrūṃ phaṭ(1) namaḥ / oṃ viṃ vāmadevāya hrūṃ phaṭ namaḥ / oṃ buṃ(2) aghorāya hrūṃ phaṭ namaḥ / oṃ(3) tatpuruṣāya vaumīśānāya ca hrūṃ phaṭ ||
:e ity āgneye mahāpurāṇe śivapratiṣṭhā(8) nāma saptanavatitamo 'dhyāyaḥ ||
oṃ ādhāraśaktaye namaḥ / oṃ kūrmāya namaḥ / oṃ skandāya ca tathā namaḥ / oṃ hrīṃ nārāyaṇāya namaḥ / oṃ aiśvaryāya namaḥ

oṃ aṃ adhaśchadanāya namaḥ / oṃ padmāsanāya namaḥ / oṃ ūrdhvacchadanāya namaḥ / oṃ padmāsanāya namaḥ / atha sampūjyāḥ keśavās tathā / oṃ hrīṃ karṇikāya namaḥ / oṃ kṣaṃ puṣkarākṣebhya(1) ihārcayet / oṃ hāṃ puṣṭyai hrīṃ ca jñānāyai hrūṃ kriyāyai tato namaḥ / oṃ nālāya namaḥ / ruṃ dharmāya namaḥ(2) / ruṃ jñānāya vai namaḥ(3) / oṃ vairāgyāya vai namaḥ / oṃ vai adharmāya namaḥ(4) / oṃ ruṃ ajñānāya vai

huṃ vāce huṃ ca rāgiṇyai kraiṃ jvālinyai tato namaḥ / oṃ hrauṃ śamāyai(5) ca namaḥ / hruṃ jyeṣṭhāyai tato namaḥ / oṃ hrauṃ rauṃ krauṃ navaśaktyai gauṃ ca gauryāsanāya ca / gauṃ gaurīmūrtaye namaḥ / gauryā mūlamathocyate / oṃ hrīṃ saḥ(6) mahāgauri rudradayite svāhā / gauryai namaḥ / gāṃ hrūṃ hrīṃ śivo gūṃ syāt śivāyai kavacāya ca / goṃ netrāya ca goṃ astrāya oṃ gauṃ vijñānaśaktaye, oṃ gūṃ kriyāśaktaye namaḥ(7) / pūrvādau śākrādikān / oṃ suṃ subhāgāyai namaḥ / hrīṃ vījalalitā tataḥ / oṃ hrīṃ kāminyai ca namaḥ / oṃ hrūṃ syāt kāmaśālinīmantrair gaurīṃ pratiṣṭhāpya prārcya japtvātha sarvabhāk(8) ||
:e ity āgneye mahāpurāṇe dvārapratiṣṭhā nāma śatatamo 'dhyāyaḥ ||

satyalokataḥ / apunarmārakā yatra brahmaloko hi smṛtaḥ / pādādyadhasturbhūloko bhuvaḥ sūryādvavaḥ smṛtaḥ / svarloko bhuvāntaś ca niyutāni caturdaśa / ekadaṇḍaṃ kaṭāhena vṛto brahmāṇḍavistaraḥ / vārivahnyānalāśaistato bhūtādināvadhi / vṛtaṃ daśaguṇair aṇḍaṃ bhūtādirmahatā tathā / daśottarāṇyaśeṣāṇi śukra kasmānmāmune / mahāntañca samāvṛtya pradhānaṃ samavasthitaṃ / anantasya na tasyāntaḥ saṃsthānaṃ na ca vidyate / hetubhūtamaśeṣasya prakṛtiḥ sā purā mune / asaṅkhyātāni cāṇḍāni tatra jātāni ca dṛśāṃ / daruṇyagniryathā tailaṃ tena tadvat pumāniti / pradhānevasthito vyāpī cetanātmātmavedanaḥ / pradhānaś ca pumāṃś caiva sarvabhūtātmabhūtātmabhūs tathā / viṣṇuśaktyā mahatprājñavṛttau saṃśrayadharmiṇau / tayoḥ saiva pṛthagbhāve karaṇaṃ saṃśayasya ca / mahākhyaṃ svatalaścākhyaṃ pātālaṃ cāpi sattama / kṛṣṇapītāruṇāḥ śukraśarkarāśailakāñcanāḥ / bhūmayasteṣu cānyeṣu santi daityādayaḥ sukhaṃ / pātālānāmadhaścānte śeṣo viṣṇoś ca tāmasaḥ / guṇānanyān sa cānantaḥ śirasā dhārayanmahīṃ / bhuvodho narakā lokaṃ nayate kṣatravaiṣṇavaḥ / vāriṇā bhāvitā pṛthvī yāvattāvannabho mataṃ / siddhāntamastuyābhyaiva, indrāsthe yamasūryakaṃ / mallabdheṣu ka.. , kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , cha.. , jha.. cihnitapustakeṣu sāvitraḥ sālayaḥ ity ataḥ paraṃ naiṣa pāṭho vartate / teṣu tu mudritapāṭha eva vartate punaḥ ja.. cihnitapustake sāvitraḥ sālaya ity ataḥ paraṃ indrāsyeyamasūryakamityantaḥ pāṭho nāsti / ja.. cihnitapustake ya uktapāṭho dṛśyate tatra pūrvāparasaṅgatirnāsti / prakaraṇāntarīyapāthoyamatra lekhakabhramāt samāgata iti bhāti
:e ity āgneye mahāpurāṇe svāyambhuvaḥ sargo nāma saptādhikaśatatamo 'dhyāyaḥ ||

oṃ vajrakāya vajratuṇḍa kapilapiṅgala karālavadana ūrdhvakeśa mahābala raktamukha(2) taḍijjihva mahāraudra daṃṣṭrotkaṭa kaha karālina mahādṛḍhaprahāra laṅgeśvarasetubandha śailapravāha gaganacara ehyehi bhavaganmahābalaparākrama bhairavo jñāpayati ehyehi mahāraudra dīrghalāṅgūlena amukaṃ veṣṭaya veṣṭaya jambhaya jambhaya khana khana vaite hrūṃ phaṭ(3) aṣṭatriṃśacchatandevi hanumān sarvakumbhakṛt //AP_125.051cd/ paṭe hanūmatsandarśanādbhaṅgamāyānti śatravaḥ //52//AP_125.052ab/

oṃ hūṃ oṃ hrūṃ oṃ spheṃ astraṃ moṭaya(1) oṃ cūrṇaya

oṃ hūṃ kṣūṃ hrūṃ oṃ namo bhagavati daṃṣṭriṇi bhīmavaktre mahograrūpe hili hili raktanetre kili kili mahānisvane kulu oṃ vidyujjihve kulu oṃ nirmāṃse kaṭa kaṭa gonasābharaṇe cili cili śavamālādhāriṇi drāvaya oṃ mahāraudri sārdracarmakṛtācchade(2) vijṛmbha oṃ nṛtya asilatādhāriṇi bhṛkuṭīkṛtāpāṅge viṣamanetrakṛtānane vasāmedoviliptagātre kaha

oṃ bhūḥ svāhā oṃ bhūvaḥ svāhā oṃ svaḥ svāhā oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ svāhā oṃ devakṛtasyainaso 'vayajanamasi svāhā oṃ pitṛkṛtasyainaso 'vayajanamasi svāhā oṃ ātmakṛtasyainaso 'vayajanamasi svāhā oṃ manuṣyakṛtasyainaso 'vayajanamasi svāhā oṃ enasa enaso 'vayajanamasi svāhā / yaccāhameno vidvāṃś cakāra yaccavidvāṃstasya sarvasyainaso 'vayajanamasi svāhā agnaye sviṣṭikṛte svāhā oṃ prajāpataye svāhā ||

:e ity āgneye mahāpurāṇe maheśvarasnānalakṣakoṭihomādayo nāma ṣaṭṣaṣṭyadhikadviśatatamo 'dhyāyaḥ ||

āsyācca vacanīnāḍyau dhātūna prāpnoti hi kramāt //AP_293.041ef/
oṃ jvala mahāmate hṛdayāya garuḍavirālaśirase(2) garuḍaśikhāyai garuḍa viṣabhañjana prabhedana prabhedana vitrāsaya vitrāsaya vima-[!!!]

pakṣi pakṣi mahāpakṣi mahāpakṣi kṣi kṣi svāhā //AP_294.023cd/

oṃ namo bhagavate nīlakaṇṭhāya ciḥ amalakaṇṭhāya ciḥ
namaste rudramanyava itisarmārjanādviṣaṃ vinaśyati na sandehaḥ karṇajāpyā upānahāvā :p

iṃ śrīṃ hrīṃ hrauṃ hūṃ(1) trailokyamohanāya viṣṇave
jvalitaparaśupāṇaye ca / namo bhagavate pakṣirudrāya daṣṭakaṃ utthapaya
oṃ namo bhagavate rudra nāśaya viṣaṃ sthāvarajaṅgamaṃ kṛtrimākṛtrimaviṣamupaviṣaṃ nāśaya nānāviṣaṃ daṣṭakaviṣaṃ nāśaya dhama
oṃ hrīṃ khīṃ saḥ ṭhandrauṃ hrīṃ ṭhaḥ

:e ity āgneye mahāpuraṇe viṣahṛnmantrauṣadhaṃ nāma ṣannavatyadhikadviśatatamo 'dhyāyaḥ

:e ity āgneye mahāpurāṇe gonasādicikitsā nāma saptanavatyadhikadviśatatamo 'dhyāyaḥ

oṃ namaḥ sarvamātṛbhyo bālapīḍāsaṃyogaṃ bhuñja bhuñja cuṭa cuṭa sphoṭaya sphoṭaya sphura sphura gṛhṇa gṛhṇa ākaṭṭaya ākaṭṭaya evaṃ siddharūpo jñāpayati / hare hare nirdoṣaṃ kuru kuru bālikāṃ bālaṃ striyam puruṣaṃ vā sarvagrahāṇāmupakramāt
cāmuṇḍe namo devyai hrūṃ hrūṃ hrīṃ apasara apasara duṣṭagrahān hrūṃ tadyathā gacchantu gṛhyakāḥ anyatra panthānaṃ rudro jñāpayati
oṃ namo bhagavati cāmuṇḍe muñca muñca baliṃ bālikāṃ vā :p
:e ity āgnaye mahāpurāṇe bālagrahaharaṃ bālatantraṃ nāma aṣṭanavatyadhikadviṣatatamo 'dhyāyaḥ
oṃ bhasmāstrāya vidmahe ekadaṃṣṭrāya dhīmahi tanno jvaraḥ pracodayāt
:e ity āgneye mahāpurāṇe grahahṛnmantrādikaṃ nāma navanavatyadhikadviśatatamo 'dhyāyaḥ ||
gaṇaṃ jayāya namaḥ ekadaṃṣṭrāya acalakarṇine gajavaktrāya mahoharahastāya pañcāṅgaṃ sarvasāmānyaṃ siddhiḥ syāllakṣajāpyateḥ //AP_300.003cd/
:e ity āgneye mahāpurāṇe sūryārcanaṃ nāma triśatatamo 'dhyāyaḥ ||
oṃ hrīṃ oṃ namaḥ kāmāya sarvajanahitāya sarvajanamohanāya prajvalitāya sarvajanahṛdayaṃ mamātmagataṃ kuru
:e ity āgneye mahāpurāṇe aṅgākṣarārcanaṃ nāma dvyadhikatriśatatamo 'dhyāyaḥ ||
:e ity āgneye mahāpurāṇe pañcākṣarādipūjāmantrā nāma tryadhikatriśatatamo 'dhyāyaḥ ||
:e ity āgneye mahāpurāṇe pañcapañcāśadviṣṇunāmāni nāma caturadhikatriśatatamo 'dhyāyaḥ ||
evaṃ sahasrāre hūṃ phaṭ ācakrāya svāhā hṛdayaṃ vicakrāya śivaḥ
namo viṣṇujanebhyaḥ sarvaśāntikarebhyaḥ pratigṛhṇantu śāntaye namaḥ
oṃ kṣauṃ namo bhagavate nārasiṃhāya jvālāmāline dīptadaṃṣṭrāyāgninetrāya sarvarakṣoghnāya sarvabhūtavināśāya sarvajvaravināśāya daha
:e ity āgneye mahāpurāṇe nārasiṃhādimantrā nāma pañcādhikatriśatatamo 'dhyāyaḥ
oṃ śrīṃ hrīṃ hrūṃ oṃ namaḥ puruśottamaḥ puruṣottamapratirūpa lakṣmīnivāsa sakalajagatkṣobhaṇa sarvastrīhṛdayadāraṇa tribhuvanamadonmādakara suramanujasundarojanamanāṃsi tāpaya

trailokyamohanāya vidmahe smarāya dhīmahi tanno viṣṇuḥ pracodayāt ātmārcanāt kratudravyaṃ prokṣayecchuddhapātrakaṃ /AP_306.012ab/ kṛtvātmapūjāṃ vidhinā sthaṇḍile taṃ samarcayet //AP_306.012cd/ karmādikalpite pīṭhe padmasthaṃ garuḍopari /AP_306.013ab/ marvāṅgasundaraṃ prāptavayolāvaṇyayauvanaṃ //AP_306.013cd/ madāghūrṇitatāmrākṣamudāraṃ smaravihvaliṃ /AP_306.014ab/ divyamālyāmvaralepabhūṣitaṃ sasmitānanaṃ //AP_306.014cd/ viṣṇuṃ nānāvidhānekaparivāraparicchadam /AP_306.015ab/ lokānugrahaṇaṃ saumyaṃ sahasrādityatejasaṃ //AP_306.015cd/ pañcavāṇadharaṃ prāptakāmaikṣaṃ dvicaturbhujam /AP_306.016ab/ devastrībhirvṛtaṃ devīmukhāsaktekṣaṇaṃ japet //AP_306.016cd/ cakraṃ śaṅkhaṃ dhanuḥ khaḍgaṃ gadāṃmuṣalamaṅkuśaṃ /AP_306.017ab/ pāśañca vibhrataṃ cārcedāvāhādivisargataḥ //AP_306.017cd/ śriyaṃ vāmorujaṅghāsthāṃ śliṣyantīṃ pāṇinā patiṃ /AP_306.018ab/ sābjacāmarakarāṃ pīnāṃ śrīvatsakaustubhānvitāṃ //AP_306.018cd/ mālinaṃ pītavastrañca cakrādyāḍhyaṃ hariṃ yajet /AP_306.019ab/ oṃ sudarśana mahācakrarāja duṣṭabhayaṅkara chida
namaḥ / śāraṅgāya saśarāya hūṃ phaṭ / bhūtagrāmāya vidmahe caturvidhāya dhīmahi tanno brahma pracodayāt / sambartaka śvasana pothaya
oṃ śrīṃ krīṃ hrīṃ hūṃ trailokyamohanāya viṣṇave namaḥ
oṃ namo bhagavate varāhāya bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥpataye bhūpatidvaṃ me dehi hṛdayāya svāha pañcāṅgaṃ nityamayutaṃ japtvāyūrājyamāpnuyāt //AP_306.026cd/
:e ity āgneye mahāpurāṇe trailokyamohanamantro nāma ṣaṣṭhādhikatriśatatamo 'dhyāyaḥ ||
śriye devi vijaye namaḥ / gauri mahābale bandha
oṃ hrīṃ mahāmahiṣamardini ṭha ṭha mūlamantraṃ bhahiṣahiṃsake namaḥ / mahiṣaśatruṃ bhrāmaya
:e ity āgneye mahāpurāṇe trailokyamohanīlakṣmyādipūjā nāma saptādhikatriśatatamo 'dhyāyaḥ :p

strīṃ oṃ hrūṃ kṣaiṃ hrūṃ phaṭ tvaritāyai namaḥ / khe ca hṛdayāya namaḥ /cache śirase namaḥ /chekṣaḥ śikhāyai namaḥ / kṣastrī kavacāya namaḥ / strīṃ hrūṃ netrāya namaḥ / hrūṃ khe astrāya phaṭ namaḥ / oṃ tvaritāvidyāṃ vidmahe tūrṇavidyāñca dhīmahi tanno devī pracodayāt / śrīpraṇitāyai
khecaryai namaḥ / oṃ caṇḍāyai namaḥ / chedanyai namaḥ kṣepaṇyai namaḥ /striyai hrūṃ kāryai namaḥ / kṣemaṅkaryai jayāyai kiṅkarāya rakṣa / oṃ tvaritājñayā sthiro bhava vaṣaṭ
:e ity āgneye mahāpurāṇe tvaritāpūjā nāmāṣṭādhikatriśatatamo 'dhyāyaḥ % chapter {309}
hrīṃ jvala jjalaśikhā syāt kavacaṃ hanudvayam / hrīṃ śrīṃ kṣūnnetratrayāya vidyānetraṃ prakīrtitam kṣauṃ haḥ khauṃ hūṃ phaḍastrāya guhyāṅgāni purā nyaset
:e ity āgneye mahāpurāṇe tvaritāmūlamantro nāma daśādhikatriśatatamo 'dhyāyaḥ
oṃ namo bhagavati jvālāmānini gṛdhragaṇaparivṛte svāhā yuddhegacchan japanmantraṃ pumān sākṣājjayī bhavet /AP_312.015ab/
oṃ śrīṃ hrīṃ klīṃ śriyai namaḥ
oṃ hrīṃ chaṃ nityaklinne madadrave oṃ oṃ
oṃ hrīṃ anaṅgāya namaḥ oṃ hrīṃ hrīṃ smarāya namaḥ

oṃ chaṃ nityaklinne madadrave oṃ oṃ / a ā i ī u ū ṛ ṝ ḷ ḹ e ai o au aṃ aḥ / ka kha ga gha ṅa ca cha ja jha ña ṭa ṭha ḍa ḍha ṇa ta tha da dha na pa pha ba bha ma ya ra la va śa ṣa sa ha kṣa / oṃ chaṃ nityaklinne madadrave svāhā ādhāraśaktiṃ padmañca siṃhe devīṃ hṛdādiṣu //AP_312.028ef/

:e ity āgneye mahāpurāṇe nānāmantrā nāma dvādaśādhikatriśatatamo 'dhyāyaḥ ||
om hrīṃ hūṃ khe che kṣaḥ strīṃ hrūṃ kṣe hrīṃ phaṭ tvaritāyainamaḥ
oṃ hrīṃ kṣūṃ chanda chanda caturaḥ kaṇṭhakān kālarātrikāṃ
:e ity āgneye mahāpurāṇe tvaritājñānaṃ nāma trayodaśādhikatriśatatamo 'dhyāyaḥ

oṃ pheṃ hūṃ phaṭ phetkāriṇi hrīṃ jvala
oṃ kuñjarī brahmāṇī / oṃ mañjarī māheśvarī / oṃ vetālī kaumārī oṃ kālī vaiṣṇavī / oṃ aghorā vārāhi / oṃ vetālī intrāṇī urvaśī / oṃ jayānī yakṣiṇī / navamātaro he mama śatruṃ gṛhṇata
:e ity āgneye mahāpurāṇe stambhanādimantrā nāma caturdaśādhikatriśatatamo 'dhyāyaḥ

aiṃ hrīṃ śrīṃ spheṃ kṣauṃ bhagavati ambike kubjike spheṃ oṃ bhaṃ taṃ vaśanamo aghorāya sukhe vrāṃ vrīṃ kili kili viccā sphrauṃ he sphraṃ śrīṃ hrīṃ aiṃ śrīmiti kubjikāvidyā sarvakarā smṛtā bhūyaḥ skandāya yānāha mantrānīśaś ca tān vade //AP_315.005cd/

:e ity āgneye mahāpurāṇe gaṇapūjā nāma saptadaśādhikatriśatatamo 'dhyāyaḥ

oṃ namo bhagavate mahāpāśupatāya atulabalavīryaparākramāya tripañcanayanāya nānārūpāya nānāpraharaṇodyatāya sarvāṅgaraktāya bhinnāñjanacayaprakhyāya śmaśānavetālapriyāya sarvavighnanikṛntaratāya sarvasiddhipradāya bhaktānukampine asaṃkhyavaktrabhujapādāya tasminsiddhāya vetālavitrāsine śākinīkṣobhajanakāya vyādhinigrahakāriṇe pāpabhañjanāya sūryasomāgninetrāya viṣṇukavacāya khaḍgavajrahastāya yamadaṇḍavaruṇapāśāya rudraśūlāya jvalajjihvāya sarvarogavidrāvaṇāya grahanigrahakāriṇe duṣṭanāgakṣayakāriṇe
khaḍgāya phaṭ / vāruṇāya phaṭ / pāśāya phaṭ / dhvajāya phaṭ / aṅkuśāya phaṭ / gadāyai phaṭ / kuverāya phaṭ / triśūlāya phaṭ

phaṭ / yoginyastrāya phaṭ / daṇḍāstraya phaṭ / sahādaṇḍāstrāya phaṭ / nānāstrāya phaṭ / śivāstrāya phaṭ / īśānāstrāya phaṭ / puruṣāstrāya phaṭ / aghorāstrāya phaṭ / sadyojātāstrāya phaṭ / hṛdayāstrāya phaṭ / mahāstrāya phaṭ / guruḍāstrāya phaṭ / rakṣasāstrāya phaṭ / dānavāstrāya phaṭ / kṣauṃnarasiṃhāstrāya phaṭ / tvaṣṭrastrāya phaṭ / sarvāstrāya phaṭ / naḥ phaṭ / vaḥ phaṭ / paḥ phaṭ / phaḥ phaṭ / maḥ phaṭ / śrī phaṭ / pheḥ phaṭ / bhūḥ phaṭ / bhuvaḥ phaṭ / svaḥ phaṭ / janaḥ phaṭ / tapaḥ phaṭ / sarvaloka phaṭ / sarvapātāla phaṭ / sarvatattva phaṭ / sarvaprāṇa phaṭ / sarvanāḍī phaṭ / sarvakāraṇa phaṭ / sarvadeva phaṭ / hrīṃ phaṭ / śrīṃ phaṭ / hūṃ phaṭ / struṃ phaṭ / svāṃ phaṭ / lāṃ phaṭ / vairāgyāya phaṭ / māyāstrāya phaṭ / kāmāstrāya phaṭ / kṣetrapālāstrāya phaṭ / hūṃkārāstrāya phaṭ / bhāskarāstrāya phaṭ / candrāstrāya phaṭ / vighneśvarāstrāya phaṭ / khroṃ khrauṃ phaṭ / hrauṃ hroṃ phaṭ / bhrāmaya
oṃ hale śūle ehi brahmasatyena viṣṇusatyena rudrasatyena rakṣa māṃ vāceśvarāya svāhā ||
oṃ kṣuṃsaḥ vaṣaṭ mahāmṛtyuñjayo mantro japyāddhomācca puṣṭikṛt /AP_322.017ab/
oṃ haṃsaḥ hrūṃ hūṃ sa hraḥ sauṃḥ
oṃ tatpuruṣāya vidmahe mahādevāya dhīmahi tanno rudraḥ pracodayāt

sarvebhyo namaste rudrarūpebhyaḥ / oṃ vāmadevāya namo jyeṣṭhāya namaḥ rudrāya namaḥ / kālāya namaḥ kalavikaraṇāya namo balavikaraṇāya namo balapramathanāya namaḥ / sarvabhūtadamanāya namo manonmānāya namaḥ oṃ sadyojātaṃ pravakṣyāmi sadyojātāya vai namaḥ /AP_322.020ab/ bhave bhave 'nādibhave bhajasva māṃ bhavodbhava //AP_322.020cd/ pañcabrahmāṅgaṣaṭkañca(1) vakṣye 'haṃ bhuktimuktidaṃ /AP_322.021ab/ oṃ namaḥ paramātmane parāya kāmadāya parameśvarāya yogāya yogasambhavāya sarvakarāya kuru
oṃ śivaḥ śivāya namaḥ śivaḥ / oṃ hṛdaye jvālini svāhā śikhā / oṃ śivātmaka mahātejaḥ sarvajña prabhurāvartaya mahāghora kavaca piṅgala namaḥ / mahākavaca śivājñayā hṛdayaṃ bandha
:e ity āgneye mahāpurāṇe ṣaḍaṅgānyaghorastrāṇi nāma dvāviṃśatyadhikatriśatatamo 'dhyāyaḥ

oṃ rudrāya ca te oṃ vṛṣabhāya namaḥ avimuktāya asambhavāya puruṣāya ca pūjyāya īśānāya pauruṣāya pañca cottare viśvarūpāya karālāya vikṛtarūpāya avikṛtarūpāya vikṛtau(2) cāpare kāle apsu māyā ca nairṛte /AP_323.013ab/

agnipurāṇasya kakārādi-cihnita-daśasaṃkhyakādarśa-pustakānāṃ madhye navasu ādarśapustakeṣu yamagītādhyāyāt paraṃ purāṇa-māhātmyādhyāyena pustakaṃ sampūrṇaṃ / ga-cihnita-pustake tu yama-gītādhyāyāt paraṃ atiriktatrayastriṃśat saṃkhyakasṛṣṭiprakaraṇādyadhyāyā vartante / uktādhyāyānāṃ navasu ādarśapustakeṣu avidyamānatvāt pramāṇyaṃ sandigdhaṃ / prāmāṇyepi sthānaviśeṣe viluptākṣarapariśuddhaga-cihnitaikamātrādarśapustakamavalambya uktātiriktādhyāyātramudrāpaṇe samartho nābhūvaṃ / parantvetadvijñāpanāya gacihnitādarśapustakamātrasthitātirikta katipayādhyāyā yathāśakti pariśodhya pariśiṣṭarūpeṇa mudrāpitāḥ / gacihnitādarśapustakasya viluptākṣaratvādapariśuddhatvācca asya pariśiṣṭasya vahuṣu sthāneṣu asādhupāṭhā vartante iti

:e ity āgneye mahāpurāṇe sṛṣṭi-prakaraṇaṃ nāma tritīyo 'dhyāyaḥ
paṭhante ye viṣṇuparāḥ sadā narāḥ idaṃ dvijāste vimalā

dve vidye brahma iti gha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
brahmāvagamyate iti kha, ga, gha, cihnitapustakatrayapāṭhaḥ
nāvaṃ badhvā tasya śṛṅge iti kha, gha, cihnitapustakadvayapāṭhaḥ
rajjaṃ kṛtvā tu iti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
rājyavardhana iti kha, ga, gha cihnitapustakatrayapāṭhaḥ
na tvaṃ bhāryā iti ga, gha, cha, cihnitapustakatrayapāṭhaḥ
yato balī iti kha, ga, cihnitapustakadvayapāṭhaḥ gato balī iti kha, ṅa, cihnitapustakadvayapāṭhaḥ
gauravācchavarīnataḥ iti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ / śavarīṃ tata iti kha, ga, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
svargamārgeṇa vai gata iti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p
bhūtamuccāvacaṃ hy ajāditi kha, gha, cihnitapustakadvayapāṭhaḥ sāndhyāṃstair ayajan devān bhūtamuccāvacaṃ prajā iti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
sāgnayo hy agāditi kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ, agnipālā varhiṣado hy ājyapāḥ sāgnayo hy ajāditi gha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
prahvī sandhyā tatheśānānugrahāsanamūrtikā iti ga, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
hrīṃ tvaritāyai, hrīṃ aiṃ klīṃ sau tripurā iti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
rudranāsikāmiti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ vaktranāsikāmiti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
samidbhirvā tilais tathā iti gha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
tadvai śiṣyantusannayediti kha, gha, ṅa, cihnitapustakatrayapāṭhaḥ
paṅktidvayaṃ dvayaṃ dikṣu vīthyarthaṃ viniyojayediti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p
dikṣu tatrāṣṭakaṃ likhediti kha, ga, gha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p
pratyagniṣṭomakamiti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ jyotiṣṭomakamiti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p
sapta ca iti ga, kha, cihnitapustkadvayapāṭhaḥ :p
pādāntareṇa mālā syādaṣṭottarasahasraśaḥ iti ga, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
trisūtrāṇi ca bhadrake iti gha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
oṃ hrāṃ haḥ phaṭ hamiti ga, cihnitapustakapāṭhḥ
oṃ kṣauṃ haḥ phaṭ krūmiti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
gaṇaś ca tāsu pūjyo 'tha iti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
rakṣābandhaṃ vimucya ceti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ / pavitraṃ mūlato dadyādrakṣārthaṃ tadvisṛjya ceti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
gaṇeśvara iti ga, gha, ṅa, cihnitapustakatrayapāṭhaḥ
kṛṣṇāśraye gatā iti kha, gha, ṅa, cihnitapustakatrayapāṭhaḥ
caiśvaraṃ tatheti ga, ṅa, gha, cihnitapustakatrayapāṭhaḥ
nadyadriṣu iti kha, ga, ṅa, cihnitapustakatrayapāṭhaḥ :p
rasameva ceti ga. gha. ṅa. cihnitapustakadvayapāṭhaḥ
catyurbhāgeṇa vā yutamiti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ / caturbhāgeṇa saṃyutamiti ga, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
jitaṃ tata iti kha, ga, ṅa, cihnitapustakatrayapāṭhaḥ
makareddhari jāhnavīti kha, gha, ṅa, cihnitapustatrayakapāṭhaḥ
kṣapaṇā kṣamā iti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ / kṣapaṇā kṣapā iti ga, gha, cihnitapustakadvayakapāṭhaḥ
madhyataḥ kṛtvā tataḥ pīṭhamiti gha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
sahadevāṃ siṃhapucchīmiti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ / sahadevāṃ javāṃ siṃhīmiti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
sādhyārthair vibhavair iti kha, ga, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
yathā tattve tathā dehe iti kha, ga, gha, ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
dhyātvā paścāttu deśika iti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
catasraḥ sthāpayecca gā iti ga, gha, ṅa, cihnitapustakatrayapaṭhaḥ
prokṣayed gandhatoyeneti kha, gha, ṅa, cihnitapustakatrayapāṭhaḥ
jitāḥ śaktyādicihnitamiti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ / jitāḥ śakrādicihnitamiti ga, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
calācalāmiti kha, ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ, sulocanamiti ga, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
dara dara iti kha, ga, ṅa, iti cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
evaṃ datvā iti kha, ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ / etān datvā iti gha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
śayanotthāpane gṛhe iti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ / śayanotthāpane hareriti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
krūṃ phaḍantaśarātmanā iti kha, ṅa, cihnitapustakadvayapāṭhaḥ
dākṣiṇyaḥ karmaṇāṃ sandhyā iti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
hrīṃ hraṃ hraiṃ sa iti gha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
gandhakān iti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ / luḍḍukāniti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ

sasenaṃ bhāskaraṃ paramiti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ / śāsanaṃ bhāskaraṃ paramiti ga, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ / śāśanaṃ bhāsraṃ paramiti ṅa cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ / śāsanaṃ tryakṣaraṃ paramiti gha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p
sūtrite sūryamarcayediti kha, ga, gha, ṅa, cihnitapustakacatuṣṭayapāṭhaḥ
sadyojātena ca hṛdā cottare vāmanīyakamiti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ / sadyojātena ca hṛdā cottare dhāma niṣphalamiti ga, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
ādityadvāradikpālān skandeśānau śive 'nale iti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
antaś cara tvaṃ bhūtānāmiti ga, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
pralayānala iti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ / pralayātmaka iti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p

oṃ aṃ haḥ astrāsanāya hraṃ phaṭ / oṃ aṃ astramūrtaye namaḥ / oṃ paśūṃ huṃ phaṭ pāśupatāstrāya namaḥ / oṃ hṛdayāya hraṃ phaṭ namaḥ / oṃ śrīṃ śirase hrūṃ phaṭ namaḥ / oṃ maṃ śikhāyai phaṭ namaḥ / oṃ astrāya phaṭ hūṃ phaṭ namaḥ / iti ga, cihnkitapustakapāṭhaḥ / oṃ haḥ astrāsanāya krūṃ phaṭ / oṃ oṃ astramūrtaye namaḥ / oṃ svāṃ svaṃ krūṃ phaṭ pāśupatāstrāya svāhā / oṃ oṃ hṛdayāya krūṃ phaṭ namaḥ / oṃ paṃ śikhāyai krūṃ phaṭ namaḥ / oṃ khaṃ kavacāya krūṃ phaṭ namaḥ / oṃ haṃ phaṭ astrāya phaṭ namaḥ / iti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p
oṃ hāṃ hauṃ hoṃ śāntyatītakalāpāśāyeti ga, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p
oṃ hūṃ hrīṃ hāmiti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
oṃ haṃ haṃ hāṃ ātmane nama iti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
oṃ hāṃ hūṃ hūṃ hāmiti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
oṃ hrīṃ hraṃ hāṃ hūṃ iti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p
oṃ hūṃ hrāṃ hāṃ iti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
chedanaṃ bhedanaṃ teṣāṃ bahulīkaraṇantathā iti ga, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p
oṃ hāṃ huṃ haḥ phaṭ iti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
oṃ hūṃ śikhāyai hūṃ phaṭ iti kha, ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ / oṃ hrīṃ śikhāyai hraṃ phaḍiti ga, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
oṃ hrīṃ ātmanniti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ / oṃ hauṃ ātmanniti gha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
tathā kṣau hrau mantrāḥ sūryasyeti ga, gha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p

koṇastambheṣu saṃyuteti ka.. , ga.. , gha.. ca / koṇastambheṣu sanmateti ṅa.. / koṇastambhenusaṃyuteti kha.. , cha.. ca
maṅgalāya ca rocaneti ga.. / maṅgalāya ca rocanamiti ja..
uṃ hāṃ hāṃ iti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , cha.. ca / oṃ īṃ āṃ iti gha.. , ja.. ca
śavārūḍhamiti ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , ja.. ca
mūrtibhāgadvaye cyute iti ja.. / mūrtibhagadvaye yute iti ja..
brahmaśilāntatheti kha.. , ṅa.. , cha.. , ja.. ca
pṛthivīmūrtyadhipataye iti kha.. / pṛthivīmūrtyadhipāyeti ja.. , gha.. ca
praṇavaṃ pūrvaṃ hūṃ prauṃ hrīṃ iti kha.. / praṇavapūrvaṃ hūṃ sūṃ iti ga.. / praṇavapūrvaṃ krūṃ sūṃ kloṃ krīṃ iti
evaṃ vidhāyetyādiḥ, pūrṇayā saha homayedityantaḥ saptaślokātmakaḥ pāṭho ga.. pustake nāsti
oṃ hāṃ hāṃ vāṃ oṃ oṃ vāṃ oṃ bhūṃ bhūṃ vāṃ iti kha.. , ga.. , cha ca / oṃ hāṃ hāṃ vāṃ oṃ oṃ vāṃ oṃ oṃ oṃ vāṃ hūṃ hūṃ vāṃ iti ja / oṃ oṃ hāṃ vāṃ oṃ oṃ oṃ vāṃ oṃ hūṃ hūṃ iti ṅa..
vilāsī tṛpta eva ca iti kha.. , ṅa.. , cha.. , ja.. ca / avināśī tṛpta eva ca iti ṅa..
oṃ sadyojātāya hūṃ phaṭ iti jha.. / evaṃ sadyojātāya oṃ hrūṃ phaṭ nama iti kha.. , cha.. ca / oṃ evaṃ sadyo jātāya hūṃ phaṭ nama iti ga.. , ja.. ca
pṛthak pīṭhe iti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. ca
snānādikaṃ ca sampūjya iti kha.. , cha.. , ca
vinyasya ca niveśayātha iti kha.. / vinyasya sannibodhyātheti ja..
sarvātmabhinnātmānaṃ svātmanā iti kha.. / sarvātmābhinnamātmā ca sthāṇuneti ja..
nyūnādidoṣanāśārthaṃ kṛtveti jha.. / nyūnādidoṣanāśāya hutveti gha.. , ja.. ca
oṃ vyāpakeśvarāya hṛdayāya nama iti kha.. , ga.. ca / oṃ vyāpakeśvara hṛdayā nama iti jha.. , gha.. ca
tribhistu kalaso garbha iti kha.. , cha.. ca
mithunair atha vallībhiriti kha.. , cha.. ca
vanavāsī mṛtirdhanamiti gha.. / dharmaḥ kaliścetyādiḥ, mṛtirdhanamityantaḥ pāṭho jha.. pustake nāsti
tathā sthitamiti kha.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , cha.. ca / yathāsthitamiti ja..
gṛhāṇi nagarādiṣu iti jha.. / gṛhāṇi nagarāṇi tu iti kha..
sutebhya u iti kha.. , cha.. ca
yogaprastāre iti ga.. , ja.. , jha.. ca
ṛṣitīrthaṃ brahmatuṅgamiti gha.. / bhūmitīrthaṃ brahmasañjñamiti cha..
tīrthaṃ kaṇakhalamityādiḥ, kālikāsaṅgamuttamamityantaḥ pāṭho cha.. pustake nāsti
annadānāddivamiti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , cha.. , ja.. ca
kāśīṃ tu na hi santyajediti ja..
nāmāsuro raudra iti gha.. , jha.. ca
gantumiti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , cha.. , ja.. ca
anvaṣṭakāsu vṛddhau ceti gha.. , ṅa.. ca
ato deva iti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , cha.. ca
brahmasadasi iti kha.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , ja.. ca
phalgutīrthāśrayamiti ga.. , gha.. , ja.. , jha.. ca
dadau gata iti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , cha.. , ja.. ca
pretarājetyādiḥ, svapitṝṃstathetyantaḥ pāṭho jha.. pustake nāsti
namennara iti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , cha.. ca
sarvakāmasamāyuktaḥ kulamuddhṛtya lokabhāgiti pāṭhotra jha.. pustake 'dhiko 'sti
pūjayitvātheti ka.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , ja.. ca
ekaikasyetyādiḥ, prathame caredityantaḥ pāṭho jha.. pustake nāsti
svāhāyai nityameva bhavantviti iti kha.. , cha.. ca
yastu labhecchrāddhakṛtaṃ phalamiti kha.. , cha.. , ja.. ca
śaktimānṛkṣaparvata iti gha.. , cha.. ca / śuktimānṛkṣaparvata iti ja..
rudrābha iti ka.. / vikrama iti kha.. , cha.. ca
viddhamṛkṣaṃ vivarjayet iti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , cha.. , ja.. ca
yātrāsiddhiṣu sampada iti ga.. , ja.. ca
saikena saptakair iti kha.. , ga.. ca
makarādau ity ādiḥ, vedarasāḥ kramādityantaḥ pāṭhaḥ cha.. pustake nāsti
vahnibhiś ca hṛtaṃ kṛtvā iti gha.. :p
spandanamityādiḥ, jayadevobhijittathetyantaḥ pāṭhaḥ gha.. pustake nāsti
oṃ namo bhagavate bhairavāyeti kha.. , gha.. ca
bhūtabhedena bhinnāni iti ṅa./ tāni bhedena bhinnāni iti gha..
dagdhatvaṃ jāyate kṣaṇāt iti gha.. , ja.. ca
mriyate hy avicārita iti kha.. / mriyate hy avicārata iti ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. ca
mantraś caiva tu iti kha.. , gha.. , ja.. , ña.. ca
svārthapakṣe iti kha.. , gha.. , ja.. , ña.. ca / svātmapakṣe iti jha..
pannagāstatra iti ka.. , ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , ña.. ca / pannagāḥ smṛtā iti jha..
vajracañcuṃ ceti ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , ña.. ca
rudraśarīraṃ pānayeti kha.. / rudraśarīraṃ ghātayeti gha.. , ña.. ca
muṣṭimudgarasaṃyuktau iti ja.. / ṛṣṭimudgarayuktau ceti ña..
cakramphaṇīśvarantadvat iti ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , jha.. , ña.. ca :p
sadhanuḥśūlakartṛkāmiti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , ja.. , ña.. ca :p
durmukhe mukhro loka iti kha.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , ña.. ca
sahadevā iti kha.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , cha.. ca
tridaśākṣyandhimanubhirdhvajalepāditi ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , cha.. ca :p
kāmo 'tha muktaka iti ja.. , cha.. , ña.. ca
sadāśivaṃ svayaṃ yajediti ṅa.. , cha.. , ja.. ca
śaktiḥ syādyā vivarṇikā iti ja.. / śaktiścānyā trikhaṇḍiketi ña..
oṃ namaścāmuṇḍe māheśvarītyādiḥ, vicce svāhetyantaḥ pāṭhaḥ cha.. pustake nāsti
krīṃ kha kha ye khrauṃ iti cha..
dharmarūpamiti ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , ña.. ca :p
śrījīvanañca tatra syāt proktamiti ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , ña.. ca :p
nṛtyañca varjayediti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , cha.. , ña.. , ṭa.. ca / sāyaṃ prātaścetyādiḥ, nṛtyañca vai tyajedityantaḥ pāṭhaḥ ja.. pustake nāsti :p
vaivāhikebde iti gha.. , ṅa.. , ña.. , ṭa.. ca
tatrāghamarṣaṇamityādiḥ devatāpitṛtarpaṇamityantaḥ pāṭhaḥ jha.. pustake nāsti
dhaneṣu ceti ka.. , kha.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , cha.. , ja.. , ña.. ca :p
kāryameva tathā bhavediti cha.. , ṅa.. , ña.. ca / kāryametattathā bhavediti jha..
siddhārthakaistilair viprān yajadvāso 'paraṃ dadhaditi gha.. , ṅa.. , ña.. ca / siddhārthastilair vidvān snāyādvāso 'paraṃ dadhaditi ga.. , ṭa.. ca :p
viśuddhiḥ kathiteti gha.. , ṅa.. , ña.. ca
mṛtake tu tryaho bhavediti gha.. , ṅa.. , ña.. ca / matake tu tathā bhavediti jha..
prete, bhaginīsuta ity api iti ṭa..
vṛkṣamūlāni kha.. , gha.. , cha.. , jha.. ca / vṛkṣamūlādi iti ṭa..
etaddvijanmasāgryamiti kha.. , ṅa.. , jha.. , ña.. , ṭa.. ca / etaddvijanmasāmagrīti gha. :p
mātāmahānāmityādiḥ, svapitṛbhyaḥ svadhocyatāmityantaḥ pāṭhaḥ jha.. pustake nāsti :p
pitṛpūrvaṃ visarjayediti kha.. , cha.. , jha.. ca
sadā duḥstha iti kha.. , cha.. ca
caurahastagatāpi veti kha.. , gha.. , ña ca
svasaṃvedyaṃ hi tad brahma iti ga.. , ṅa.. ca / susaṃvedyaṃ hi tad brahma iti ja.. , ṭa.. ca / svayaṃ vedyaṃ hi tad brahma iti gha.. , ña.. ca :p
dharmaṃ vai paramāmṛtamiti kha.. , cha.. ca :p
dvitīyaṃ vaiśyaśūdrayoreti ka.. , kha.. , ṅa.. , ña.. ca
samāni brahmahatyayeti kha.. , ṅa.. , ña.. ca
viṣṇave viṣṇave iti ja.. , ña.. ca :p
tataḥ karmāṇīti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , cha.. ca :p
pravṛttaistu nivṛttaistu ijyate bhuktimuktida iti gha.. , ṅa.. , jha.. , ña.. ca
smṛtayaḥ śrutayo vratamiti ka.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , ña.. ca / ahaṃ brahmetyādiḥ, tapovratamityantaḥ pāṭhaḥ ga.. pustake nāsti
taiḥ syurdevādaya iti ga.. , cha.. ca
dadhnaś caiva palatrayamiti gha.. , ña.. , ṭa.. ca
vrate deva iti ga.. , gha.. , ja.. , jha.. , ña.. , ṭa.. ca :p
śayyāṃ dadyāddvitīyake iti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , cha.. , ja.. , ña.. , ṭa.. ca
śivaṃ rudrāya viśvāyeti kha.. , cha.. ca / śivaṃ bhadrāyeśvarāyeti ja.. , jha.. , ña.. , ṭa.. ca
śivaṃ vedātmane tadvadrūpiṇyai iti gha.. , ja.. , ña.. ca
varṣānte iti kha.. , ṅa.. , ṭa.. ca
mārgaśīrṣe caredvratamiti gha.. , ja.. , jha.. , ṭa.. ca
māghe kṣīrī maheśvaramiti gha.. , cha.. , ña.. ca
sugativratamucyate iti kha.. , gha.. , cha.. , ja.. , ña.. , ṭa.. ca /suśāntivratamucyate iti ja..
gato vīra iti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , ja.. , ña.. ca
mahākauśikaṃ maṇḍape iti gha.. , ña.. ca
manorathadvādaśītyādiḥ, anantadvādaśīvratītyantaḥ pāṭhaḥ gha.. pustake nāsti
trailokyajananāyeti jha.. , ña.. ca / trailokyajanakāyeti ṅa.. , ṭa.. ca :p
svarṇapātrāṇi iti kha.. , gha.. , ña.. ca
hariṃ yajediti cha.. , ja.. , ña.. ca
anurādhetyādiḥ grahārtinudityantaḥ pāṭhaḥ jha.. pustake nāsti :p
nakṣatravratakāmadamiti kha.. , ga.. , cha.. ca / nakṣatravratake 'nnadamiti gha.. , ṅa.. , ña.. ca :p
dadyāt triṃśatpalādūrdhvamiti gha.. , ja.. , ña.. ca
trirātraśatakavrato iti kha.. , gha.. , ña.. ca / trirātraśatakakṛd vrato iti ṅa..
matsyādi tyaktveti kha.. , gha.. , cha.. ca / matsyatyāgī tu iti ṅa.
sudhīḥ sārasvatavratī iti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , cha.. , ṭa.. ca
harṣitamiti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. ca / dūṣitamiti ṅa.. :p
krūṃ viṣṇuṃ kṣauṃ nṛsiṃhakamiti kha.. , cha.. , ja.. ca
yavavrīhitilaistatheti gha.. , ṅa.. , cha.. , ja.. ca :p
hariṃ lebhe tenaitaditi ga.. / hariṃ prāpa tenaitaditi ṅa.. / hariṃ prāptastenaitaditi ja.. , ṭa.. ca
saubhāgyāya suṣṭadvaye iti ka.. , cha.. , ṭa, ca / saubhāgyāya subuddhaye iti gha.. , ja.. , ña.. ca :p
syādatreti ga.. , gha.. , ja.. , ña.. ca :p
kuśodetyādiḥ strīdhanaṃ smṛtamityantaḥ pāṭhaḥ cha.. pustake nāsti :p
brahmabodhake iti gha.. , ṅa.. , ja.. , ña.. , ṭa.. ca
na taddānasya vidyate iti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , cha.. , ja.. , ña.. , ṭha.. ca :p
atra ratnācalabodhakapāṭhaḥ patitaḥ daśavidhācalavibhāgasya pratijñātatvāt matsyapurāṇīyasaptasaptatyadhyāye ratnaśailas tathāṣṭama ity anena ratnācalasya daśavidhācalāntargatatvenollekhanācca :p
kṛṣṇā vaitaraṇī iti ja.. , jha.. , ṭa.. ca
gavāṃ śatapradānenetyādiḥ, sarvakāmadā ity antaḥ pāṭhaḥ jha.pustake nāsti
pāpo iti kha.. , cha.. , ja.. ca
svarge mahīyate iti ga.. / svarge sukhī bhavedeti gha.. , ṅa.. ca :p
sammārjanamityādiḥ maṇḍalādhipatirbhavedityantaḥ pāṭhaḥ ja.. pustake nāsti :p
svargaloke ciraṃ vasediti ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , ṭa.. ca / śivaloke ciraṃ vasediti jha.. :p
saṅkalpya taddadediti ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , ña.. ca
svalpā sā tu tribhāgeneti ṅa.. , ṭa.. ca :p
naramedhaphalaṃ labhediti ga.. , ṅa.. , ña.. ca
dehapūjita iti kha.. , gha.. , cha.. ca
padmarāgo 'maladyutiriti kha.. , cha.. , ja.. , ṭa.. ca
drupadādīni vāpyṛcā iti ṅa.. , ja.. , ña.. ca :p
rājā hariti cha.. , kha.. , gha.. , ja.. , ña.. , ṭa.. ca
rudrakā iti ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , ña.. ca :p
hairaṇyakastatheti gha.. , ṅa.. , ja.. ca / hiraṇmayaśtatheti cha.. :p
abhiṣiñcantu pānta ceti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , cha.. , ja.. , ña.. , ṭa.. ca :p
puṣpaphaladhānyadhanānvita iti ga.. , gha.. , ña.. , ṭa.. ca :p
vinā hy arthamiti gha.. , ña.. ca
bāladāyādikaṃ yuktamiti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , ña.. ca
tasmādrāṣṭramiti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , cha.. , ja.. , ña.. , ṭa.. ca :p
tantrīvādyavinodaścetyādiḥ, tailasya kṛśarasya cetyantaḥ pāṭhaḥ cha.. , jha.. pustakadvaye nāsti
guḍasarpau ceti ga.. , gha.. , ña.. ca :p
pratilomāstathetyādiḥ, siṃhamārjāragardabhā ity antaḥ pāṭhaḥ ja.. bha.. pustakadvaye nāsti :p

punnāmāstathetyādiḥ, pippīkā ity antaḥ pāṭho 'smallabdheṣu navapustakeṣu prāyaḥ samāna eva / teṣāmekatamasyāpi sāhāyyena śodhituṃ na sa śakyate / abhidhānādiṣvapi tatratyaśabdo nopalabhyante / atastatra viratiḥ :p
nanvarthasādhaka ity ādiḥ, gṛhe gata ity antaḥḥ pāṭhaḥ ṭa.. pustake nāsti
vāmaṃ dakṣiṇetyādiḥ, sammukhamārutādityantaḥ pāṭhaḥ jha.. pustake nāsti :p
vivarjayet iti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , ña.. ca
maṇḍaleṣu ca sarveṣu sureśvarasamā hi te ity ardhaśloka āsārastvityasya pūrvaṃ ṭa.. pustake vartate, parantvasaṃlagnaḥ :p
guptaṃ cāprakaṭaṃ carediti ga.. , ja.. , ṭa.. ca
camūnāṃ pṛṣṭhaś caiva ripunāśo bhavedyatheti ṭa..
śatrudrāvakāraṇamiti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , ña.. ca
dharmaniṣṭho jayo nitya iti kha.. , cha.. ca
kṣayaḥ svayamiti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , jha.. ca / kṣayaḥ śubhamiti cha..
vāgimatā dārḍhyamāpatkālasahiṣṇuteti kha.. , gha.. , ja.. , jha.. ca :p
dīnopagatarakṣaṇamiti kha.. , gha.. , cha.. , ja.. , ña.. , ṭa.. ca
svāmyamātyetyādiḥ, pālayet sadetyantaḥ pāṭhaḥ ga.. pustake nāsti
rājyaṃ rāṣṭrañceti kha.. , cha.. , ña.. ca
ātmana ity adiḥ, vigrahamityantaḥ pāṭhaḥ ga..pustake nāsti
ubhayorityādiḥ, svayaṃ vrajedityantaḥ pāṭhaḥ ja.. pustake nāsti
naya iṣyate iti kha.. , gha.. ca
dṛṣṭivaktraviceṣṭitair iti ga.. , gha.. , cha.. , jha.. , ña.. ca
asmallabdhapustakanāṃ madhye ka.. ja.. cihnitapustrakadvaye daṇḍādikatipayavyūhānāṃ vinduvinyāsaistattannāmasamīpe ākṛtayaḥ pradarśitāḥ , parantu tā aśuddhā / tā
caturasramityādiḥ, pañcāśadaṅgulocchrayair ityantaḥ pāṭhaḥ ja..pustake nāsti
lohadaityamityādiḥ, harṣitā ity antaḥ pāṭhaḥ ja.. pustake nāsti
haṃsamārgaṃ vimārgañceti gha.. , ña.. ca / samārgañca vimārgañceti ṭa.. :p
pārakaṃ tārakaṃ gaṇḍamiti kha.. , gha.. ca
apaśyatā ity ayaṃ pāṭho na sādhuḥ :p
vyasanābhiplutepi veti kha.. , gha.. , ña.. ca :p
pratibhāvyamṛṇaṃ sākṣyamavibhaktena tat smṛtamiti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , cha.. , ja.. , ṭa.. ca :p
catvāro 'tha daśāpi veti kha.. , ga.. , ña.. ca :p
dadyādityatra dāpya iti pāṭho bhavituṃ yuktaḥ :p
prarohiśākhināmityādirviṃśaterdviguṇā damā ity antaḥ pāṭhaḥ kha.. pustake nāsti :p
pāpair hi vipramucyata iti ga.. , gha.. , ña.. ca :p
bhojanañcāpnuyācchatamiti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , ja.. ca
khādirameva veti ga.. , gha.. , ña.. ca
viṣṇorvirāṭamityetaditi gha.. , ña.. ca / viṣṭorarāṭamityetaditi ka.. , ja.. , ṭa.. ca :p
śivasaṃkalpa ity etaditi gha.. , ja.. ca
bhāgata iti ka.. , ga.. , cha.. , ña.. ca
paripriyādeva kāririti kha.. , cha.. ca / paripriyādeva kaviriti gha.. , ña.. ca
indra vanaṃ vanik cetīti gha.. , ja.. ca
kruddhaṃ bhūpaṃ prasādayediti gha.. , ja.. , jha.. ca :p
hy ekaikaśa iti ka.. , gha.. , cha.. , ña.. ca :p
gandhaṃ svadheti ka.. , ga.. ,gha.. , ja.. ca :p
saurabheyā iti ka.. , gha.. , cha.. , ña.. ca
hastapuṣyāśvayuksaumyavaiṣṇaveṣu śubheṣu ceti gha.. , ña.. ca
vaṣaṭkārasamanvitair iti gha.. , ja.. , ña.. , ṭa.. ca :p
paṭasthamiti ka.. , ga.. , cha.. , ja.. , ṭa.. ca :p
kukuro bhajamānastviti ka.. / sundaro bhajamānastviti ja..
atra pāṭhaḥ patitaḥ dhanañjayāt ka utpanna iti viśeṣāprāpteḥ :p
pathyā tathaiva kāśasya maṇḍaṃ takrañca vāruṇamiti kha.. , ña.. , ca
tatpakṣair iti ja.. , ña.. , ṭa.. ca
ṣaṣṭivyoṣaguḍakṣīrayoga iti ka.. , ja.. , ña.. , ṭa ca :p
madhyeṣu toraṇadvahiriti kha.. , ja.. , ña.. ca :p
triśikhī cordhvavāhuka iti kha.. , cha.. ca :p
dakāradvitayasthāna iti ña.. / ukāradvitayasthāna iti ṭa..
siṃhasthāvāhyasiṃhastheti kha.. , cha.. , ña.. , ṭa.. ca
kaśyapa iti ja.. , ña.. , ṭa.. ca
bālavāsiketi kha.. , ṭa.. ca / vanavāsiketi ña..
pavanopameti kha.. / gamanopameti ka.. , ṭa.. ca :p
sattvopādhisamāyuktaḥ sadā dhyeyaś ca keśava iti kha..
ārūḍho 'yaṃ gajaṃ rājā paralokastathetara iti kha.. , ña.. ca
bhaveyaṃ ye tadā dānaṃ dāsyante syāttadakṣayamiti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
sumantraś ca vaśiṣṭhaka iti kha, ga, gha, ṅa, cihnitapustakacatuṣṭayapāṭhaḥ
nāhaṃ rājyaṃ prayāsyāmi iti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ rājyaṃ nāhaṃ prayāsyāmi iti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p
tvāṃ mārgayet preṣayecca māmiti gha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p
draupadīṃ pañca pāṇḍavā iti kha, ga, ṅa, cihnitapustakatrayapāṭhaḥ
gandhamātrā dharitryabhūditi kha, ga, gha, cihnitapustakatrayapāṭhaḥ
sa dṛṣṭvā manasā iti kha, ga, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
rajogotrordhvāhuka iti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ rājā śātrordhvabālaka iti ga, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ, rajogotrordhvavāhaka iti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
durgāṃ giriṃ gaṇamiti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ durgāṃ śivaṃ gaṇamiti gha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
agnisāśrayavāyugāniti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ / arkāya śirase tadvadagnijāyāyutañca taditi ṅa,cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
svakāmān dāhayet sudhīḥ iti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ svakamāhlādayet sudhīriti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
asmallabdhapustakeṣu viṣṇurarghovasānata iti viṣṇāvarghau ca mānataḥ iti ca pāṭho vartate / ayansvasamīcīna iva pratibhāti viṣṇumarghyāsanādibhiriti tu yuktaḥ pāṭhaḥ
kaṇṭhakaṃ dvyaṅgulamiti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ candrābhaṃ dvyaṅgulamiti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p
ādyaṃ tayostu sampūjya trīn vārānūrdhvamutkṣipediti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p
evaṃ vyūhādiṣaḍviṃśaṃ vyūhāttasyātmano manuriti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
dikpālāṃś ca vidhistasya iti ga, gha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ dikpālādau vidhistulya iti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p
vairājaṃ nāgasaṃyutamiti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭḥaḥ / yau vījaṃ cāṅgasaṃyutamiti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
karālaṃ kartarīñcāpi iti kha, ga, cihnitapustakadvayapāṭhaḥ
oṃ suṃ āyāhi hāmiti kha,cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ oṃ saṃ pāhi svāhā iti ga, ṅa, cihnitapustakadvayapāṭhaḥ
pūjāṃ kṛtvā visarjayediti gha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ vimalādīn visarjayediti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
tat punariti kha, ga, gha, ṅa, cihnitapustakacatuṣṭayapāṭhaḥ :p
yaṣṭavyamiti yajñena iti ga, gha, cihnitapustakadvayapāṭhaḥ yaṣṭavyamiti mantreṇa iti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
oṃ hūṃ haḥ phaṭ hūmiti ga, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ oṃ hrāṃ haḥ phaṭ hrūmiti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
oṃ hrīṃ haḥ phaṭ hrūniti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
oṃ hrīṃ phaṭ hamiti ga, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ oṃ hrūṃ haḥ phaṭ hūmiti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
oṃ kṣauṃ haḥ phaṭ krūmiti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
rakṣa rakṣa pradhvaṃsaya kavacāyeti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
pavitrakaṃ tvañca pūjāyāṃ hṛdaye vaheti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p
nandanti iti kha, ga, cihnitapustakadvayapāṭhaḥ / valganti iti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
śilā syānna śilāmaye iti ga, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
aṣṭāhutīplathā pūrṇair ājyamiti ga, gha, ṅa, iti pustakatrayapāṭhaḥ
cakrī gadyatha śaṅkhyapi iti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p
mahārakta iti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ / mārtaṇḍaś ca mahārakta iti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
lolā raktā ca lokeśo iti ga, gha, ṅa, cihniapustakatrayapāṭhaḥ
sthaulyād yavavṛddhyā tadaṣṭadhā iti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p
nāḍhye devārcita iti kha, ga, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
gāyatryā gandhavāriṇā iti ga, gha, ṅa, cihnitapustakatrayapāṭhaḥ
manasāhṛtya mano 'haṅkaraṇe kṣare iti gha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
oṃ ṣaṃ parameṣṭyātmane yannamaḥ puruṣātmane / laṃ namo viśvātmane namaḥ // naṃ namaḥ sarvātmane ity uktāḥ pañcaśaktayaḥ iti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
yajed gandhādinā tata iti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ / yajedāhutibhis tathā iti ga, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
tatra tān pūjayet surāmiti ga, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p
ghoṣayecca tato makhe iti ga, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
yacca te paramaṃ guhyamiti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
śuktinirmalamiti ga, gha, cihnitapustakadvayapāṭhaḥ / śulvanirmitamiti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
vimbārdhamānaṃ cakrantu iti kha, ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
aśvamūrdheti mantreṇa tāṃ kumbhebhiniveśayediti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
rakṣa rakṣa oṃ phaṭ iti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ / rakṣa rakṣa hrīṃ phaḍiti ga, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
āsāṃ rudreti kīrtayediti ṅa, ga, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
mūle tvagnau ca homayediti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
utthāya iti kha, ga, gha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
oṃ viṣṇave pravṛṣāya svāhā iti gha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p
svādvannasaṃyuktāniti kha, ga, gha, ṅa, cihnitapustakacatuṣṭayapāṭhaḥ :p
devaiś ca munibhiḥ sārdhamiti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ / divyaiś ca balibhirdhūpair devamiti gha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p
balakarṇine ceti kha, ga, gha, ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
krūṃ phaḍantaśarātmanā iti kha, ṅa, cihnitapustakadvayapāṭhaḥ :p
hāṃ īśānāya pitre ca sadājyāya pitāmahāyeti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p
siddhirbhavatu me deveti kha, ga, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
hāṃ hrīṃ hraṃ samiti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ / hūṃ hāṃ krūṃ samiti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
bhāsvarāniti kha, ga, gha, ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
anyārdhamiti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ / antyārdhamiti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
oṃ raudrakoṭigirike iti kha, ga, gha, ṅa, cihnitapustakacatuṣṭayapāṭhaḥ :p
pustake gurave gaṇo iti kha, ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p
paripūrṇaṃ karo tu me iti ga, cihitapustakapāṭhaḥ
oṃ hāṃ hāṃ ātmane nama iti ga, gha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ / oṃ hāṃ ātmane nama iti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
oṃ hāṃ hauṃ hūṃ phaṭ iti ga, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
asmallabdhapañcapustakeṣu dadhyārdramāṃsamadyāderityārabhya homo ghoreṇa śāntaye ity antaḥ pāṭhaḥ pūrveṇānanvita iva pratibhāti

śabda sūkṣma śiva sarvada sarvādhyakṣakara brahmaviṣṇurudra oṃ namaḥ śivāya oṃ namo namaḥ oṃ namaḥ śivāya oṃ namo namaḥ iti / anarcita saṃstuta pūrvavinda oṃ sākṣiṇa oṃ rudrāntaka oṃ pataṅga oṃ jñāna oṃ śabda oṃ sūkṣma oṃ śiva oṃ sarva oṃ sarvada oṃ sarvasānnidhyakara brahmaviṣṇu rudrakara oṃ namaḥ śivāya oṃ namo nama iti ca, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p
oṃ hāṃ haṃ hāṃ haḥ phaṭ iti kha, ṅa, cihnitapustakadvayapāṭhaḥ
vyomavyāpakarūpāya iti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ / vyomarūpāyeti ga, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
oṃ hy aimiti ka, ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ / oṃ omiti ga, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ / oṃ yaimiti gha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p
oṃ hāṃ haṃ hrīmātmane nama iti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p
oṃ hrīṃ ātmane iti kha, ga, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ / oṃ hīṃ ātmanniti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
kuryādityādiḥ muttānamasurākṛtimityantaḥ ślokadvayātmakapāṭho ga.. pustakake nāsti
vedī pādāntaraṃ tyakteti gha.. , ṅa.. , ca
praṇavārghyakaro muniriti ga.. / punararghyakaro muniriti ṅa..
devāmarāgare iti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , cha.. ca
tejasā vāhyamantaramiti kha.. / tejasā vāhyābhyantaramiti cha.. / tejasā vāhyamāntaramiti ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. ca
astramanye tu saṃsthitamiti ga.. / astramanye tu saṃhitāmiti ṅa..
bhadrapīṭhe nidhāyainamiti kha.. , cha.. , ca / tatra pīṭhe vidhāyeśamiti ṅa.. / bhadrapīṭhe vidhāyeśamiti gha..
tribhukte bhāvavarṇanāditi ka.. / tribhukte bhāgavarjanāditi gha.. / tribhakte bhāgavarjanāditi ja.. / tribhukte bhāgavartanāditi ṅa.. / vibhakte bhāvavarṇanāditi cha..
muktvā bhāgadvayaṃ budha iti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , ḍa.. , cha.. ca
śastramantreti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , cha.. ca
sāyudhān pūjayettata iti kha.. , cha.. ca / sāyudhān pūjayedvahiriti ga.. , ṅa.. ca / sāyudhāś ca tyajedvahiriti gha.. / sāyudhānyājagredvahiriti ja..
mūrtipāṃś ca kareṇukān iti gha.. , ṅa.. ca
prāsādamastramuccaran iti kha.. , ṅa.. ca / prasādaṃ śāstramuccaranniti ga.. , ja.. ca
bandhubhiḥ saha kartavyā devayānasyeti kha.. / bandhubhiḥ sahakāre ca devālayasya iti ga.. , ja.. ca
mantraṃ sandhārayitvātha iti kha.. / patrasthaṃ dhārayitvā tu, iti gha..
sannidhāya prakīrtitā iti kha.. , cha.. ca
deva tvaṃ nātha tat sarvaṃ kāruṇyān manave nama iti jha..
sthāpanamityādiḥ, kuryād vibhājite ity antaḥ pāṭho ṅa.pustake nāsti
vinyasya padapañcakamiti cha.. / vinyasya ratnapañcakamiti ja..
jaṅghāto yadvā jaṅghārdhato bhavediti kha.. / saṅghāto yathā jaṅghārdhato yajediti gha..
naṭādīnāmimāstatheti kha.. , ṅa.. ca / nāṭyādīnāmimāstatheti ga.. , gha.., cha.. ca / nādādīnāmimāstatheti ja..
dvāre śvabhrabiddhe iti kha.. , gha.. , ṅa.. ca
viṃśa eva ceti kha.. , cha.. ca
ramyenīlācalāśriyamiti kha.. , ṅa.. , jha.. ca / ramyaṃ nīlācale sthitamiti gha..
śrīparvataṃ kondragiririti cha.. / śrīparvataṃ kolagirimiti ja..
saritaḥ sāgarā ity ādiḥ, upasthamṛṣayo vidurityantaḥ pāṭho ga.. pustake nāsti
tīrthaṃ vānarakaṃ paramiti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. ca
tattapastāpitair iti ga.. , gha.. , jha.. ca
tadaṅgānnirmitā iti jha.. / tadarthā nirmitā iti cha..
yadi iti gha.. , ga.. , jha.. ca :p
mayāgatyetyādiḥ, snānaṃ kuryādyatavrata ity antaḥ pāṭhaścha.. pustake nāsti
pretādirūpamuktā iti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , ja.. ca
namedbuddhivināyakamiti kha.. , ga.. , cha.. ca / namedvṛddhavināyakamiti gha.. :p
kālārtināśanamiti gha.. / kālārtidalanamiti ga.. , ṅa.. , gha.. , ja.. ca
satye prapanno 'nadhvanyo hy asvādhyāyaśceti kha.. , gha.. ca :p
prārthayettata iti gha.. , ja.. , jha.. ca
athābhyudayikamityādiḥ, yavair iha ity antaḥ pāṭho jha.. pustake nāsti :p
tathā vanyair iti kha.. , ṅa.. ca
śreṣṭhabhāgyapi iti kha.. , ga.. , ṅa.. , cha.. ca / jyeṣṭhabhāgapi iti gha..
vārāṇasī iti kha.. , ṅa.. , cha.. , ja.. ca :p
varṇāśramātmaja iti kha.. , gha.. , ja.. ca
kuśala ity ādiḥ, nimnagā ity antaḥ pāṭho jha.. pustake nāsti
dvijādaya iti ka.. , kha.. , ga.. , cha.. ca
ṛṣabho raveriti ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , ja.. ca
pūrveṣu cānale iti ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. ca :p
``nave varṣe gurorvāre atha bhārgavasaumyayoḥ'' eṣa pāṭhotra cha.. pustakedhiko 'sti
tatra vījaṃ jīvanāyeti kha.. , cha.. ca / tatra jīvaṃ jīvaloka iti ṅa
bharaṇītyādiḥ, pīḍākaro bhavetyantaḥ pāṭhaḥ cha.. pustake nāsti
kaṭideśa ity ādiḥ, saurirgurustathetyantaḥ pāṭhaḥ gha.. pustake nāsti
cipiṭāni ca bhāni hi iti ka.. , cha.. ca
varjayeddaśamiti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. ca :p
yathā cādau iti ka.. , ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. ca
svārthanāśaś caturthastu iti kha.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , ja.. , ña.. ca
mocayedyuddhakāle tu iti ja.. , jha.. ca
oṃ hūṃ khaḥ oṃ bhairavo jñāpayati svāhā
abhayo bhavediti ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. ca
rakṣāmantramiti kha.. , ga.. , ṅa.. , ja.. ca
mantrasyeti ka.. , kha.. , ga.. , cha.. ca
oṃ nīlajīmūtavarṇe oṃ hrām hrīṃ hrūṃ raudrarūpe hūṃ hrīṃ klīṃ oṃ hrīṃ hūṃ oṃ ākarṣa oṃ dhūna
oṃ he haḥ khaḥ vajriṇi hūṃ kṣūṃ kṣāṃ krodharūpiṇi prajvala
oṃ bhīmabhīṣaṇe bhinda oṃ mahākāye cchinda oṃ karālini kiṭi
mahābhūtamātaḥ sarvaduṣṭanivāriṇi jaye oṃ vijaye oṃ trailokyavijaye hūṃ phaṭ svāhā
oṃ phaṭ oṃ aṅkuśena śamaya praveśaya oṃ raṅga raṅga kampaya

oṃ chinda oṃ māraya oṃ anukramaya oṃ vajraśarīrampātaya(1) oṃ trailokyagatanduṣṭamaduṣṭaṃ vā gṛhītamagṛhītaṃ vā āveśaya oṃ nṛtya oṃ vanda oṃ koṭarākṣi ūrdhvakeśi ulūkavadane karaṅkiṇi oṃ karaṅkamālādhāriṇi daha oṃ paca

oṃ gṛhṇa oṃ maṇḍalamadhye praveśaya oṃ kiṃ vilambasi brahmasatyena viṣṇusatyena rudrasatyena ṛṣisatyena āveśaya oṃ kili kili oṃ khili khili vili vili oṃ vikṛtarūpadhāriṇi kṛṣṇabhujaṅgaveṣṭitaśarīre sarvagrahāveśani pralambauṣṭhini bhrūbhaṅgalagnanāsike vikaṭamukhi kapilajaṭe brāhmibhañja(2) oṃ jvalāmukhi(3)

oṃ śaktyā bhedaya daṃṣṭryā kīlaya oṃ karṇikayā pāṭaya oṃ aṅkuśena gṛhṇa oṃ śirokṣijvaramaikāhikaṃ dvyāhikaṃ tryāhikañcāturthikaṃ ḍākinīskandagrahān muñca muñca oṃ paca oṃ utsādaya oṃ bhūmiṃ pātaya oṃ gṛhṇa oṃ brahmāṇi ehi oṃ māheśvari ehi oṃ kaumāri ehi oṃ vaiṣṇavi ehi oṃ vārāhi ehi oṃ aindri ehi oṃ cāmuṇḍe ehi oṃ revati ehi oṃ ākāśarevati ehi oṃ himavaccāriṇi ehi oṃ rurumardini asurakṣayaṅkakari ākāśagāmini pāśena bandha bandha aṅkuśena kaṭa

samayaṃ tiṣṭha oṃ maṇḍalaṃ praveśaya oṃ gṛhṇa mukhambandha oṃ cakṣurbandha hastapādau ca bandha duṣṭagrahān sarvān bandha oṃ diśo bandha oṃ vidiśo bandha adhastādbandha oṃsarvaṃ bandha oṃ bhasmanā pānīyena vā mṛttikayā sarṣapair vā sarvānāveśaya oṃ pātaya oṃ cāmuṇḍe kili kili oṃ vicce huṃ phaṭ svāhā
oṃ sarvasattvavaśaṅkari sarvakāmike huṃ phaṭ svāheti
sarvakāryeṣu hraṃ trinetrāya caṣaṭ / oṃ mahāmāri sarvabhūtadamāni mahākāli astrāya huṃ phaṭ
kṣīṇadhavo loka iti ka.. / kṣīṇajano loka iti ja.. :p
oṃ khāda oṃ are raktaṃ piba kapālena raktākṣi raktapaṭe bhasmāṅgi bhasmaliptaśarīre vajrāyudhe vajrākāranicite pūrvāṃ diśaṃ bandha
saṭāvalivajjāgnivajraprākāre huṃ phaṭ hrīṃ hrūṃ śrīṃ phaṭ hrīṃ haḥ phūṃ pheṃ phaḥ sarvagrahebhyaḥ sarvavyādhibhyaḥ sarvaduṣṭopadravebhyo hrīṃ aśeṣebhyo rakṣa

kṣauṃ vicce khyoṃ śrīṃ kroṃ oṃ hroṃ aiṃ vajrakubjini(1) strīṃ trailokyakarṣiṇi hrīṃ kāmāṅgadrāviṇi hrīṃ strīṃ mahākṣobhakāriṇi aiṃ hrīṃ kṣrīṃ aiṃ hroṃ śrīṃ pheṃ kṣauṃ namo bhagavati kṣrauṃ kubjike hroṃ hroṃ kraiṃ ṅañaṇaname aghoramukhi chrāṃchāṃ vicce oṃ kili
arghaṃ puṣpaṃ dhūpaṃ dīpaṃgandhaṃ baliṃ pūjāṃ gṛhṇa
namastubhyaṃ / oṃ hrāṃ hrīṃ hrūṃ kṣeṃ kṣetrapālāya avatara
khaḥ khaḥ oṃ kaḥ oṃ laḥ oṃ mahāḍāmarādhipataye(3) svāhā
vaṭo vīra iti ja.. , cha.. ca
phaṭatrayaṃ syāt taryuddhe sarvasāddhakamiti kha.. , cha.. ca
jvalitaśikha iti kha.. , ṅa.. , gha.. , ña.. ca :p
oṃ namo mātṛgaṇāya namo namo vicce
oṃ kha khyāṃ iti cha.. / oṃ sphūṃ iti ga..
vādyaughair iti ga.. , gha.. , ña.. ca :p
loṣṭamaddītyādiḥ, na rātriga ity antaḥ pāṭhaḥ, ga.pustake nāsti
snātā iti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , cha.. , ja.. ca :p
ananepyevamevaṃ syādityādiḥ, bhokturekamahonyathetyantaḥ pāṭhaḥ gha.. , jha.. , ña.. pustakatrayeṣu nāsti :p
ity āgneye aśaucanirṇaya ity ādiḥ, satyamānandamadvayamityantaḥ pāṭho ga.. pustake nāsti :p
svaśākhāśrotriye mṛte iti gha.. , jha.. , ña.. , ṭa ca
dattair iheti gha.. , ṅa.. , ña.. ca
āyuḥ prajñādhanamiti ja.. / āyuḥ prajāṃ balamiti gha..
arthavādaṃ smṛtiḥ sūta iti kha.. , cha.. ca
anyagotro 'nyasambandha iti kha.. , gha.. , ña.. ca :p
gṛhādau maṇḍape vātheti kha.. / gṛhādau maṇḍape caivamiti ña..
kṛcchrair viśuddhyati iti ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. ca
lobhādbhuktveti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , cha.. ca :p
antyajātiśvapākenetyādiḥ, tatra ācaredityantaḥ pāṭhaḥ cha.. pustake nāsti
mātṛjāyāgame iti ga.. , cha.. , ṭa.. ca :p
sarvapāpavivarjita iti ja.. , jha.. ca / sarvataḥ parivarjita iti cha..
gāyatryā ity ādiḥ, kuśodakamityantaḥ pāṭhaḥ cha.. pustake nāsti
viprāḥ pūjyāḥ sagarava iti gha.. , ja.. , ṭa.. ca
vāme daṇḍakamaṇḍalu iti cha.. , jha.. / vāme śruvakamaṇḍalu iti cha..
viprāyātha ca pānakamiti gha.. , ña.. ca
īśāya kaṭyāṃ devyāś ca iti ṅa.. / īśāyeti tāto devyā iti gha.. :p
harañcāntakālānalapriye iti kha.. , gha.. , ja.. , ña.. ca
varṣannirvighnata iti ṅa.. , ña.. ca / varṣannirvighnavān iti ga..
airāvata ity ādiḥ, kārttakādau samācaredityantaḥ pāṭhaḥ jha.. pustake nāsti
sarvathā bhuktimuktidamiti gha.. , ja.. , jha.. ca :p
kramāt madhye copacaṇḍāṃ kṭtvā mahiṣamardinīmiti ga..
ekādaśyāmṛṣiṃ pūjyeti kha.. , cha.. ca / ekadaśyāmṛṣipūjeti ṅa..
āṣāḍharkṣe tu mūle vā iti kha.. , ga.. , ja.. , ṭa.. ca
dvādaśadvādaśīphalamiti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , cha.. , ña.. ca
agnir uvāca / akhaṇḍadvādaśīṃ vakṣye ity ādiḥ, rājyabhogādimāpnuyādityantaḥ pāṭhaḥ jha.. pustake nāsti :p
kākolaṃ prāśya cīnañceti gha.. , ja.. , jha.. , ña.. ca
varṣaṃ bhogadhanāyuṣmānityādiḥ dhvajākārāsu yaṣṭiṣu ity antaḥ pāṭhaḥ jha.. pustake nāsti
śayyāgoścādi dakṣiṇā iti kha.. , ṭa.. ca / śayyāgonnādi dakṣiṇā iti gha.. , ña.. , ja.. ca / śayyādhenvādi sakṣikā iti ṅa.. :p
kṣipediti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , ña.. ca
kārttikasya site prārcya iti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , cha.. , ja.. , ña.. ca
sarvavratāni coktānīti kha.. , cha.. , ja.. ca :p
rajanīketakībhavairiti kha.. , ṅa.. , cha.. , ja.. ca
pātyate narakeṣvapi iti kha.. / pātyate narake sadā iti ṅa.. /pīḍyate narake 'dhuneti gha.. , cha.. ca :p
mahāprete tu bhedana iti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , ḍa.. , cha.. , ja.. ca :p
pūjanātpañca upavāsādajavratamiti ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , ja.. , ña.. , ḍa.. ca :p
manasepsitamiti ga.. , gha.. , jha.. ca / manasehitamiti ṅa..
purohite yācakādāviti kha.. , cha.. , ṭa.. ca
vṛṣabhasya vimokṣaṇe iti kha.. / vṛṣabhasya ca mokṣaṇāditi ja..
maṇḍalaṃ grāmameveti ga.. , jha.. , ṭa.. ca
nama indriyaliṅgāyetyādiḥ sattvaliṅgāya vai nama ity antaḥ pāṭhaḥ ja.. pustake nāsti
purohitamathartvijamiti kha.. , gha.. , cha.. , ja.. , ṭa.. ca
saromṛdetyādiḥ saṃśodhayettathetyantaḥ pāṭhaḥ ja.. pustake nāsti :p
nīlamṛttika iti kha.. , gha.. , cha.. , ja.. , ña.. , ṭa.. ca / nīlamūrdhaja iti ṅa.. :p
nānirdiṣte iti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , ña.. ca
satyavān suvratena ceti gha.. , ña.. ca :p
naiva syādvaśavartinīti kha.. , ṭa.. ca / naiva syādvaśavartinīti gha.. , ja.. , ña.. ca
subhagā viṭabhītevetyādiḥ, karamādadedityantaḥ pāṭhaḥ jha.. pustake nāsti
kvacit kasyāpi iti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , ja.. , ṭa.. ca :p
tāmrikaiḥ kārṣika ity ādiḥ, sāhasaḥ smṛta ity antaḥ pāṭhaḥ jha.. pustake nāsti
bhūmyambudhīnāṃ grahaṇamiti ka.. , cha.. , ña.. ca :p
koṭare ity ādiḥ sarvārthasādhaka ity antaḥ pāṭhaḥ ṭa..pustake nāsti :p
āsīnaḥ karmavicchedamityādiḥ, rājā samāśrayedityantaḥ pāṭhaḥ ja.. pustake nāsti :p
ākāra grahaṇe rājño mantrarakṣā parā matā ity asya sthāne ākāreṅgitatattvajñaḥ kāryākāryavicakṣaṇa iti ṭa.. pustakapāṭhaḥ
rātrāvityādiḥ, satyaja ity antaḥ pāṭhaḥ ga.. pustake nāsti
ye ca jihmekṣaṇā iti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , ña.. ca
devān viprān gurūn yajediti gha.. , ja.. , ña.. ca :p
balotkaramiti ga.. , gha.. , ja.. , ña.. ca :p
kiṃ hi dātumiti gha.. , ña.. ca :p
jaṭharamityādiḥ, tato guṇā ity antaḥ pāṭhaḥ gha.. , ña.. , pustakadvaye nāsti :p
tasmāttu nandaka iti gha.. , ña.. ca
nāgo hutāśanaḥ śreṣṭha iti kha.. , cha.. ca :p
gandhamālyair alaṅkṛtair iti ga.. , cha.. ca :p
mantraś ca hi ratha hy etaccharāṇāmiti ka.. , cha.. ,ca :p
devarāto 'bhuditi kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , ja.. , ña.. , ṭa.. , ca
svāndhobhūditi kha.. , cha.. ca / sākṣo 'bhūditi ja.. :p
devāsuraharo 'bhavaditi ka.. , gha.. , ña.. , ṭa.. ca.. :p
suta iti kha.. , cha.. , ja.. , ca
sadāmaye iti ña.. / damātyaye iti ṭa.. :p
tattulyatāpyasya tathā yathā bhavati suśruta iti kha.. :p
vinirdiśediti ka.. , kha.. , ja.. , ṭa.. ca :p
viṣotthāpanarūpaṃ mantrāntādviṣadhāraṇaṃ oṃ kṣipa oṃ kṣipa svāhā
rakṣa māṃ sarvaviṣebhyo gauri gāndhāri cāṇḍāli mātaṅgini svāhā harimāye
vidyutpātavidhāviti gha.. , ja.. , ña.. , ṭa.. ca :p

kintiṣṭhasiyāvattāvat samīhitaṃ me siddhaṃ bhavati hūṃ phaṭ namaḥ oṃ puruṣottama tribhuvanamadonmādakara hūṃ phaṭ hṛdayāya namaḥ karṣaya mahābala hūṃ phaṭ astrāya tribhuvaneśvara sarvajanamanāṃsi hana
hūṃ phaṭ netrāya trailokyamohana hṛṣīkeśāpratirūpa sarvastrīhṛdayākarṣaṇa āgaccha
hūṃ phaṭ / aṅkuśena kaṭṭa hūṃ phaṭ kramādbhujeṣu mantraiḥ svair ebhirastrāṇi pūjayet //AP_306.019cd/
namaḥ / hūṃ mahākāye padmahaste hūṃ phaṭ śriyai namaḥ / śriyai phaṭ śriyai namaḥ / śriyai phaṭ śrīṃ namaḥ / śriye śrīda namaḥ svāhā svāhā śrīphaṭ ||
hūṃ phaṭ ṭha ṭha mahiṣaṃ heṣaya

devi hūṃ mahiṣanisūdani phaṭ durgāhṛdayamityuktaṃ sāṅgaṃ sarvārthasādhakam //AP_307.017cd/ yajedyathoktaṃ tāṃ devīṃ pīṭhañcaivāṅgamadhyagam /AP_307.018ab/ oṃ hrīṃ durge rakṣaṇi svāhā ceti durgāyai namaḥ / varavarṇyai namaḥ / āryāyai kanakaprabhāyai kṛttikāyai abhayapradāyai kanyakāyai surūpāyai ||
tripurāyajanamiti kha.. , cha.. , ja.. , ña.. , ṭa.. ca :p

oṃ hūṃ pheṃ phetkāriṇi svāhā phaṭ hetuñca samālikhya tajjapāntaṃ mahābalaṃ /AP_314.007ab/ vāmenaiva nagaṃ śūlaṃ saṃlikheddakṣiṇe kare //AP_314.007cd/ likhenmantramaghorasya saṃgrāme stambhayedarīn /AP_314.008ab/ oṃ namo bhagavatyai bhagamālini visphura
oṃ soṃ maṃ vuṃ cuṃ oṃ śaṃ vāṃ keṃ oṃ svahā
evaṃ siddhirudro jñāpayati yadi grahopagataḥ svargalokaṃ devalokaṃ vā ārāmavihārācalaṃ tathāpi tamāvartayiṣyāmi valiṃ gṛhṇa
bhavodbhava vāmadeva sarvakāryakara pāpapraśamana sadāśiva prasanna namo 'stu te svāhā ||
sūkṣmavajradhara vajrapāśa dhanurvajrāśanivajraśarīra mama śarīramanupraviśya sarvaduṣṭān stambhaya
hūṃ akṣarāṇāntu kavacaṃ śataṃ pañcākṣarādhikam //AP_322.021ef/ oṃ ojase netraṃ oṃ prasphura

suru 2(1) rudraśāntimanusmara kṛṣṇapiṅgala akālapiśācādhipativiśveśvarāya namaḥ / śivatattve karṇikāyāṃ pūjyau hy umāmaheśvarau / oṃ vyomavyāpine vyomarūpāya sarvavyāpine śivāya anantāya anāthāya anāśritāya śivāya / śivatattve nava padāni vyomavyāpyabhidhāsyahi / śāśvatāya yogapīṭhasaṃsthitāya nityaṃ yogine dhyānāhārāya namaḥ / oṃ namaḥśivāya sarvaprabhave śivāya īśānamūrdhāya tatpuruṣādipañcavaktrāya navapadaṃ pūrvadale sadākhye pūjayedguha / aghorahṛdayāya vamadevaguhyāya sadyojātamūrtaye / oṃ namo namaḥ / guhyātiguhyāya goptre anidhanāya sarvayogādhikṛtāya jyotīrūpāya agnipatre hīśatattve vidyātattve dve yāmyage parameśvarāya cetanācetana vyomana vyapina prathama tejastejaḥ māyātattve nairṛte kālatattve
oṃ namaḥśivāya oṃ namo namaḥ śivāya oṃ namo namaḥ
striyo vāṣṭa ca bhojayediti kha.. , cha.. ca :p
caraṇātmikā iti kha.. / cañcalāmbikā iti ṭa..
dve dve rekhātha dakṣiṇā iti ja..
khayaṃ suṣṭhutarā yatheti ja.. / amumuttarā yatheti ṭa..
ka.. pustake sarvatra ṛbhuriti ṛtusthānīyaḥ pāṭhaḥ :p
na māṃ kṣipa nṛpottama iti kha, ga, gha, cihnitapustakatrayapāṭhaḥ :p
saṃśrutaṃ pāpanāśanamiti kha, ga, gha cihnitapustakatrayapāṭhaḥ
tato hara iti ga, gha, cihnitapustakadvayapāṭhaḥ
māyayā mohito rudrastarasā tāṃ jagāma ha / mohinīṃ prāpya matimān striyaḥ keśāmadhārayaditi ga, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
tadā iti kha, gha, ṅa, cihnitapustakatrayapāṭhaḥ
mantharāsatī iti kha, ṅa, cihnitapustakadvayapāṭhaḥ mantharā satīmiti ga, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p
viratha iti kha, ga, ṅa, cihnitapustakatrayapāṭhaḥ
vasupūrṇamiti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ ratnapūrṇamiti gha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
tataḥ svayambhūrbhagavānityārabhya sraṣṭumicchan prajāpatirityantapāṭhastu mahābhāratīyaharivaṃśaparvaṇa uddhṛta iti adhyavasīyate ubhayatra krameṇa pāṭhasāmyāt
ajījanat sutāṃ kanyāṃ sadrūpāñca taponvitāmiti ga, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ / ajījanat sutāṃ kanyāṃ śatarūpāṃ taponvitāmiti ṅa,cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p
dve caiva bhāṇḍave tata iti ga, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p
dharmaś caivānilonala iti kha, ga, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
devair dāityāḥ parājitā iti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
yajet durgāṃ iti kha, gha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
śaktiś ca nirgatā iti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p
sthalaṃ tena tu saṃsicya haste dhyātvā hariṃ paṭhediti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
dīrghasvaraiś ca saṃyuktamaṅgopāṅgaṃ svaraiḥ kramāditi kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
ṭhaṃ ṇaṃ maṃ kṣaṃ iti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
nyasedante ca iti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ / nyasedaṣṭau ca iti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
yaḥ savyerdhe prakīrtita iti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p
tatra saṅkhyayā iti kha, ga, gha, cihnitapustakatrayapāṭhaḥ
vitānabhavagandhakair iti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ / vitānapaṭakendriyair iti ga, gha, cihnitapustakadvayapāṭhaḥ :p
aṃ duṃ stva prakṛtyā iti oṃ khaṃ khaṃ stva prakṛtyā iti ca kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
pūrṇāhutyā tu sannayediti kha, gha, cihnitapustakadvayapāṭhaḥ :p
pañcāntarastvasiddhyarthamiti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ pañcottarastu siddhyarthamiti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p
oṃ hrāṃ haḥ hrūṃ iti ga, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ oṃ hrāṃ haḥ phaṭ hrīmiti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
oṃ hrīṃ haḥ phaṭ hrūṃ iti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
somāya ca grahāya ceti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
maṇividyādharāś ca khe iti kha, cihitapustakapāṭhaḥ
vimalā tata iti ga, gha, cihnitapustakadvayapāṭhaḥ
śūlaṃ galantī kuṇḍī ceti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
haste tu vividhaṃ śailamiti ga. cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p
ṛtvagnipadakalpitamiti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ, mukhabhāgaṃ prakartavyaṃ mūlāgnipadakalpitamiti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
vāsudeve samāhita iti ṅa, iti cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
dhyāyet tanmātramiti ga, cihhnitapustakapāṭhaḥ / dhyāyet samātramiti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
pārthivaṃ pṛthivītalamiti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ / pārthivaṃ pṛthivījalamiti ga, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
harirūpā sumidvidā iti ga, ṅa, cihnitapustakadvayapāṭhaḥ :p
raupyamayyātha haimyā vā lekhanyatha varākṣaramiti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
indriyeti vicakṣaṇa iti ga, gha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p
vāyuḥ somo mahendraka iti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p
krūṃ kavacāya iti kha, ṅa, cihnitapustakadvayapāṭhaḥ
caturvaktrāṃś caturbāhūn iti gha, ṅa, cihnitapustakadvayapāṭhaḥ
guho raviriti kha, ga, gha, ṅa, cihnitapustakacatuṣṭayapāṭhaḥ
sarvatattveṣu suvrata iti kha, ga, ṅa, cihnitapustakatrayapāṭhaḥ
oṃ hāṃ hāṃ kṣaṃ hāmiti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p
oṃ hāṃ haṃ hāṃ hūṃ phaṭ iti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
dhyāyaparāyeti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ / vyānāhārāyeti ga, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
oṃ hraiṃ ātmanniti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ / oṃ ātmanniti ga, gha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
yavaparṇānīti gha.. / padmavarṇānīti kha.. cha.. ca
āpavatsacatuṣṭaye iti kha.. / tadvatsāyai ca tattale iti gha.. , ja.. ca
daśamaṃ sthāpane iti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , cha.. ca
śambarair mūrtinādhānāmiti kha. cha.. ca / śambarair mūrtimādhānamiti ṅa..
sahāyair ṛtvigvipraiśceti kha.. , gha.. ca / sahāyair bhūpativiprair iti ja..
tathā kuṇḍamiti kha.. , cha.. ca / tathā caṇḍamiti ja..
bhavelliṅgeṣu sarvata iti kha.. , ga.. , ṅa. cha.. ca
pañcadaṇḍātmake mārge iti ja.. / pañcadaṇḍātmake yāge iti ṅa..
oṃ hūṃ hrīṃ iti ga.. , ṅa.. ca / oṃ hrīṃ iti gha.. / oṃ hrīṃ hrīṃ sa iti ga..
brahmabhiraṃśaiśceti kha.. , gha.. ca / brahmabhirajñaiśceti cha.. , ja.. ca
jñeyaṃ tattu trayātmakamiti kha.. , cha.. ca / deyaṃ tatra trayātmake iti ṅa..
vāsudeva dayāśīla līlayā māṃ samuddhara / gharoddhāre samarthosi mamoddhāre kiyañchramaḥ // iti śloko kha.. , cha.. pustakedhikotrāsti :p
huṃ phaḍantaśivātmaneti kha.. , ga.. , cha.. ca / huṃ phaḍantaśivāṇuneti ja..
sthāpyamānamityādiḥ, śāntaṃ samāśrayat ity antaḥ pāṭhī ga.. , ṅa.. , pustake nāsti
mantreśair mūrtipaiḥ saha iti jha.. / mantreśair mūrtijaiḥ saha iti gha..
oṃ evaṃ ceti cha.. / oṃ evaṃ cediti ṅa.. / oṃ vai iti ja..
snānaṃ sarasvatītyādiḥ, rociṣāmityantaḥ pāṭho jha.. pustake nāsti
jīrṇādyamapi saṃsthitamiti kha.. , cha.. ca / pūjayā rahitaṃ yattadanniṣṭhamapi duḥsthitamiti kha.. , gha.. , pustake 'dhikaḥ pāṭhaḥ
ity aṅgamantrā iti kha.. , ṅa.. , ca / ity ādimantrā iti cha..
ardhabhāgeneti kha.. , gha.. , cha.. , ja.. ca
pādena vistīrṇā iti gha.. , ja.. ca
viśālaś ca mano brahmeti kha.. , gha.. ca / viśālaś ca tathā brahmeti ga..
pṛthulaṃ svatribhāgata iti kha.. , gha.. , cha.. ca / pṛthusamudrabhāgata iti ṅa..
uttarāsyā daśānyāśceti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , ja.. ca
yāmye hīne bhaveccullī triśāstraṃ dititatparamiti jha.. / yāmye hīne bhavecchatrī triśālaṃ vittahṛtparamiti ga.. :p
bhogaṃ ca patyaṃ ceti kha.. , cha.. ca
vyāyataṃ vajranāsābhamiti gha.. / cāpābhaṃ cakranābhābhamiti ṅa..
pratīhārādityādiḥ, prastārataḥ suta ity antaḥ pāṭho jha.. pustake nāsti
rasanāsmāddhemajāmbunadamiti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , cha.. ca
ramyakamityādiḥ, maryādāparvatāvubhāvityanntaḥ pāṭho jha.. pustake nāsti
aśvamedhaphalaścāsyeti kha.. , ga.. , cha.. ca / aśvamedhaphalaṃ cāpyeti gha..
śravaṇādasyeti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , ja.. ca
brahmādayaḥ punaḥ iti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , cha.. , ja. jha.. ca :p
dehe pūrṇāhutimiti kha.. , cha.. , ja.. ca
tīrthopajīvakā yūyamācandrārkamiti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. ca
devarṣigaṇasevitamiti gha.. , ja.. ca / devatāgaṇasevitamiti jha..
brahmasadastīrthe iti gha.. / brahmaśirastīrthe iti kha..
piṇḍadaḥ kulamuktikṛditi ga.. , ja.. ca / piṇḍado hy atimuktikṛditi gha..
kapileśamityādiḥ, gopracāre ca piṇḍada ity antaḥ pāṭho ga.. pustake nāsti
kulamuddhṛtya lokabhāgiti ga.. , ja.. ca / vaśiṣṭheśamityādiḥ, kulamuddhṛtya nākabhāgityantaḥ pāṭho jha.. pustake nāsti
aghorāḥ pitara ity ādiḥ, āstīrya sapavitrakānityantaḥ pāṭhaḥ kha.. , cha.. pustakadvaye nāsti :p
śaktimata iti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , jha.. ca :p
kumudaśconnataś caiveti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. ca

ity uktāntarhito matsya iti gha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
harinte iti kha, ga, gha, cihnitapustakatrayapāṭhaḥ :p

hraṃ laṃ hraṃ svāheti kha.. , cha.. , ca / oṃ hrāṃ laṃ hāṃ svāheti ja..

pṛṣṭhodakamiti ña.. / kūpodakamiti ja.. , jha.. ca

svajanebhya ity ādiḥ, kleśasahiṣṇutāmityantaḥ pāṭhaḥ cha.. pustake nāsti :p
nanu viṣṇustvamiti kha, ga, gha, cihnitapustakatrayapāṭhaḥ
tatra tatra mahātīrthaṃ kṣetrāṇāmuttamottamamiti ga, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p

pūjayitvā tataḥ śivamiti ga, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ / pūjayitvātha sañcarair iti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p
oṃ hāṃ hauṃ hauṃ iti ga, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p
oṃ hāṃ hūṃ hāmiti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
bhāvyaṃ tvayā ca śuddhena iti ga, ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p
oṃ hraiṃ ātmanniti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ / oṃ huṃ ātmanniti ga, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ / oṃ hauṃ ātmanniti gha, ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
prokṣya śāntijalaiḥ śilāmiti kha.. / prokṣya śāntijalaiḥ śilā iti ga.. , gha.. ca
sarvada iti kha.. , gha.. , cha.. ca / sarvaśa iti ga.. , ca
oṃ jaya enaṃ sadeti kha.. cha.. ca
budhaḥ ṣaḍṛtuturyeṣu diksaptāha vineti cha.. / budhaḥ ṣaḍdvyaṣṭaturṣeṣu diksaptaṣaḍ vineti kha..
śatārdhasya śate vahnimātrakamiti cha.. / śatārdhasya śate vāratrimātrakamiti gha.. / śatārdhasya śate vā vahnimātrakamiti ṅa..
tilagarbhādyamiti kha.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , cha.. ca / tiladarbhājyamiti ja..
sarvametat samuddharediti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , cha.. , ja.. ca / sarvamastraṃ samuddharediti ṅa..
navabhaktasya bhāgair aṣṭābhirāhateti kha.. , cha.. ca / bhavabhaktasya bhāgair aṣṭābhirāhateti ja.. / navabhaktasya bhāgair aṣṭābhirādṛteti gha..
vyakte iti ga.. , gha.. , ja.. ca
oṃ hūṃ hrīṃ sa iti kha.. / oṃ krūṃ hrīṃ sa iti gha.. / oṃ hrīṃ hrīṃ sa iti ga.. / oṃ hrīṃ sa iti gha.. , ṅa.. ca
pūrṇācchinnātmakasaṃvarair iti kha.. , cha.. ca / pūrṇācchinnaṃ svayaṃvarair iti ṅa..
madhūkākṣatettyādiḥ, vinikṣipedityantaḥ pāṭho ga.. pustake nāsti
uktanyāsavidhiṃ liṅge iti kha.. / uktanyāsavidhau liṅge iti ga..
vahiṣkṛtvā iti jha.. / vahirhatvā iti gha..
bhāgatrayeṇetyādiḥ, juhuyācchatamityantaḥ pāṭho jha.. pustake nāsti / atra katipayaślokādhiko 'dhyāyatrayātmakaḥ pāṭhaḥ patitosti
nyasya tatra yathākramamiti ga.. / nyasya tatrābhivāhikamiti cha.. / nyasya tatrābhivādakamiti ja..
sthaṇḍileśaprapūjanamiti kha.. , ga.. , ṅa.. , cha.. , jha.. ca / sthaṇḍile samprapūjanamiti gha.. , ja.. ca
snāpayedastramantrata iti cha.. / dhārayedastramantrata iti ja..
pañcabhāgīkṛte vāpi madhyabhāge iti gha.. , cha.. , ja.. ca
prāsādāddikṣu iti kha.. , gha.. , cha.. , ja.. ca / prāsāde dikṣu iti ṅa..
caturbhistu tadaṇḍakamiti kha.. , ga.. ca / caturbhiḥ kṛtadaṇḍakamiti ja..
sūtrapādata iti ga.. / sūtrapātata iti cha..
stutvā natvā baliṃ balī iti ṅa..
dakṣiṇe cottareṇa ceti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. ca
bhūmiṣṭha iti gha.. , ja.. ca / bhuvistha iti ṅa..
pūrvapaścāyatāvubhau iti gha.. , ṅa.. , ja.. ca
brahmalokakamiti kha.. , ga.. , ṅa.. , cha.. ca
brahmalokaga iti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , cha.. , ja.. ca
agnir uvāca / māhātmyaṃ sarvatīrthānāmityādiḥ, naimiṣaṃ paramantīrthaṃ bhuktimuktipradāyakaṃ / ity āgneye mahāpurāṇe tīrthayātrāmāhātmyamityantaḥ pāṭho jha.. pustake nāsti :p
vasatāṃ śṛṇutāṃ harimiti ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. ca :p
gado nāmāsura ity ādiḥ, tasmādādigadādhara ity antaḥ pāṭho ja.. pustake nāsti
caturdaśyāñca śāstrata iti kha.. , gha.. ca
kundābhāstatra vājina iti ka.. , gha.. , ṅa.. ca
oṃ jūṃ sa iti kha.. / oṃ hraṃ sa iti cha..
mandākinī tatheti kha.. , gha.. , cha.. ca / mandākinīti ceti jha..
triśūlakhaṭvāṅgadharāyeti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , cha.. ca / triśūline khaḍgakhaṭvāṅgadharāyeti ja.. :p
ṣaṭ ca gaṇḍe 'tigaṇḍe ceti kha.. , gha.. , cha.. ca / sapta gaṇḍetigaṇḍe ceti ga.. , ṅa.. ca
yathā sthita iti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , ja.. ca / yadā sthita iti ja.. , jha.. ca :p
mālatī vānarī tatheti cha.. , ña.. ca :p
tridaśair api gṛhyate iti gha.. , ṅa.. ca :p
bhūtośaṃ mantranāyakamiti ja.. / bhūtīśaṃ mantranāyakamiti ña..
krūṅkāramiti kha.. , gha.. , cha.. ca / oṅkāramiti ga.. , ṅa.. ca / haṅkārañceti kha.. :p
mūtroccāraṃ dvijaḥ kṛtvetyādiḥ, pūyante pāpino 'khilā ity antaḥ pāṭhaḥ ja.. , jha.. pustake nāsti :p
yaḥ paṭecchraddhayā nara iti ja.. , jha.. ca / yaḥ paṭhecchṛṇuyānnara iti ña.. :p
pūrvaṃ siddhārthakair ityādiḥ, rajanīdvayamityantaḥ pāṭhaḥ jha.. pustake nāsti :p
vāsanyai ca tathālakamiti cha.. , ṭa.. ca
vīrasya dhanapo vṛṣa iti kha.. , cha.. , ṭa.. ca / vīrasya dhanado vṛṣa iti gha.. , ṅa.. , ja.. , ña.. ca
mārgaśirasya ceti kha.. , gha.. , ja.. , ña.. ca :p
tatprado 'ghanuditi śa.. / tatprado 'ghajiditi gha.. , ṅa.. ca
kurvan santārayet kulamiti ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , ṭa.. ca :p
namaḥ pavanaliṅgāyeti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , ṭa.. ca :p
namaste sarvaliṅgāya nāmaliṅgāyeti kha.. , cha.. ca
saha sarjarasenetyādiḥ colaṃ karpūrameva cetyantaḥ pāṭhaḥ ṭa.. pustake nāsti :p
hāniś caivetyādiḥ. krīḍanaṃ tathetyantaḥ pāṭhaḥ ja.. pustake nāsti :p
avantu māṃ svabhṛtyo 'hamiti ja.. , ṭa.. ca :p
prāptavideśastu iti ga.. , gha.. , ña.. ca
sarvaduṣṭapratigraha iti kha.. , gha.. , cha.. ca
bhaktiṃ nāthāsya vardhayeti kha, ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p
nijātmabhiriti kha.. , ga.. / vinyasyetyardhaśloko ga.. pustake nāsti
lokapālātmabhirnyasyediti kha.. , cha.. ca / lokapālāṇubhirnyasyediti ṅa..
tyaktvā vā cāpasammitāmiti kha.. / tyaktvā vā rāmasammitāmiti cha..
tiryak pātasamamūrdhvamiti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. ca
prāyeṇa lakṣyakalpane iti ga.. / śayane lakṣyakaṃ pare iti ja..
nijasaṃvarair iti ga.. , ṅa.. ca / nijasañcayair iti gha.. :p
varṇavastramiti ga.. / svarṇavastramiti kha.. , ja.. , ca
śaṅkhannivedayediti ga.. / khaḍgannivedayediti gha.. , ṅa.. ca
gurumūrtiryavair iti kha.. , ṅa.. , ja.. ca
bahurūpeṇa iti ga.. , gha.. , ja.. ca
atha caivaṃ iti ja.. , jha.. , gha.. ca :p
sīsakaṃ vāgbhirdīrghābhiriti cha.. / sīsakaṃ cāpi dīrghāriti ja..
pūrvamuktāni iti kha.. , ga.. , ṅa.. , cha.. ca / pūrvabhuktānīti ja..
vyāpinañca svaśaktita iti jha.. / vyāpinañcāsya saṃsravair iti ṅa..
taḍāgārdhetyādiḥ, śailaja ity antaḥ pāṭho jha.. pustake nāsti
tacca dhvaje saṃharaṇamiti kha.. , cha.. , ca / yacca dhvajasaṃskaraṇamiti gha..
sthaṇḍilamiti kha.. , gha.. , cha.. , ja.. ca
caturdhetyādiḥ, merumūrdhni saṃsthitā ity antaḥ pāṭho ga.. pustake nāsti :p
vardhanītyādiḥ, kailāsasambhavā ity antaḥ pāṭho cha.. pustake nāsti
ilāvṛtaścetyādiḥ, navasāhasravistṛtamityantaḥ pāṭho cha.. pustake nāsti :p
dharmavratetyādiḥ, gurorgururityantaḥ pāṭhaḥ cha.. pustake nāsti :p
vastrādyaiḥ sarvamāpnuyāditi kha.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , cha.. , jha.. , ña.. , ṭa.. ca
svarṇakuṇḍe iti ga.. / svarṇakumbhe iti gha.. , ṅa.. , ca :p
buddhyādau cittaparyante cittatanmātrakāvadhau iti gha.. / sampacya ity ādiḥ tanmātrakāvadhāvityantaḥ sārdhaikaślokapāṭho ga.. pustake nāsti :p
oṃ hūṃ ghūṃ būṃ yūṃ mūṃ haṃ kṣamitīti ga.. / oṃ kaṃ sūṃ pūṃ śūṃ hrūṃ kṣamitīti gha.. / lūṃ rūṃ śūṃ pūṃ vūṃ cūṃ mūṃ hūṃ kṣūmitīti kha.. :p
puruṣātmaneti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , cha.. ca
indrādīśāntata iti kha.. , gha.. , cha.. ca
layāmantamityādiḥ, sthirībhaveti ca ity antaḥ sārdhaślokadvayātmakaḥ pāṭho jha.. pustake nāsti
nirmañchya droṇamudrayā iti ga.. / nirundhyād dravamudrayā iti jha.. :p
prāsādakāritasthāne iti kha.. , jha.. ca / prāsāde kāritasthāne iti ja..
khavṛkṣaścetyādiḥ, pṛthivīdhara ity antaḥ pāṭho ja.. pustake nāsti
daityamātā bhaveśāgnī iti kha.. / daityamātā hareśāgnī iti gha.. , ja.. ca
sarvanāśakaramityādiḥ, yathākramamityantaḥ pāṭho ja.. pustake nāsti :p
dehi māmiti kha.. , cha.. ca / dehi na iti gha.. :p
śabdatattvādhipataye iti kha.. , gha.. , cha.. ca
ghaṭasthaṇḍiletyādiḥ, ghṛtādibhiratyantaḥ pāṭho gha.. pustake nāsti
sṛṣṭyādivikalamiti jha.. / sṛṣṭyādiniṣphalamiti kha.. , gha.. , ca / sṛṣṭyādi niṣphalamiti ga.. , ḍa.. ca
vajrahastikamiti kha.. , ga.. , cha.. ca / vajramuṣṭikamiti ja.. :p
śaktyādimūrtiparyante iti kha.. , gha.. , ja.. ca :p
saṃhitātmabhiriti kha.. / sahitātmabhiriti cha.. / saṃghaṭāṇubhiriti ja.. :p
tato liṅge ity ādiḥ, diśamathāśrayedityantaḥ pāṭho ja.. pustake nāsti :p
ity uktvā devamatsyātmā bṛhatkāraṇasaṅgata iti ga, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p
bhājo hi kariṣyāmi iti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p
dvimūrdhā śambarādyāś ca iti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
namonantāya vai nama iti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
yā mūrtiḥ sthāpyate tasyāmiti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p
aṣṭau vedyeśvarāstvaja iti ga, gha, ṅa, cihnitapustakatrayapāṭhaḥ :p
śavānunā phaḍantena samāhṛtyānusaṃhatimiti kha, cihnitapustakadvayapāṭhaḥ / śavāṇunā phaḍantena samahatyārthaṃ saṃhatimiti ga, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p
pūrvavat snāpayet prārcediti ga, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ / sthāpayet pūrvavaccāgnimiti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
oṃ hūṃ hrūṃ hūmiti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p
sānnidhyamityarthaśloko ṅa.. pustake nāsti / sānnidhyamatha sandhānaṃ ity ataḥ paraṃ hrasvadīrghaprayogataḥ ity ataḥ prāṅmadhvagapāṭho gha.. pustake nāsti
tato māṃsaudanamiti kha. gha.. cha.. ca
īśānādyāḥ śivapadā skandādyāḥ padikā iti gha..
raktātiraktadoṣaghna iti cha.. / raktātriraktadoṣaghne iti kha..
budhaḥ ṣaḍaṣṭadigityādiḥ, baladaḥ sadā ity antaḥ pāṭho ga.. pustake nāsti
dvyekādaśacaturthasthā iti cha.. / tryekādaśetyardhaśloko ga.. pustake nāsti
khadgābhamagnau iti kha.. , ga.. , ṅa.. , cha.. ca
bhūtasañjīvanāsutau iti cha.. / bhūtasañjīvanāmṛtau iti kha.. , ja.. ca
śeṣadvārāṇi caṅkramediti kha.. , cha.. ca / śeṣadvārāṇi pūjayediti cha..
samuddharediti kha.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , ja.. ca
sampūjya sitavastraiśceti ga.. / sampūjyasitapuṣpaistu iti gha..
oṃ hrīṃ iti kha.. , ga.. , ṅa.. , cha.. ca
ghaṭaṃ sthaṇḍilavargīśair iti kha.. , cha.. ca
brahmādīniti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , cha ca
bandhane iti kha.. / bandhyan iti gha.. / rakṣayan iti jha.. / varjayediti cha..
piṣṭakādi ca tatkramāditi cha.. , ja.. ca
taccaitanyañca yogata iti ga.. / taccaitanyasvayogata iti cha..
tathā hy ahaṃ vadāmi te iti ṅa..
śāntiruddharaṇe nyasediti kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , cha.. ca
śambhuratreti gha.. , ja.. ca / prabhuratreti kha.. , cha.. ca
sakaṇṭhomavasāraka iti ṅa.. / sakaṇṭhomavasādhaka iti cha..
uttamānyapi catvāri catvāri daśahānita iti ja..
nagaragrāmadurgādau iti kha.. , cha.. , ja.. ca / nagaragrāmadurgākhyamiti gha.. :p
garbhapīṭhasamā iti kha.. , gha.. , jha.. ca
bhūpādmasyāsya iti kha.. , ga.. , cha.. ca
śaśivāmamukhā jale iti kha.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , cha.. ca
gacchetyuktvā svayaṃ gacchediti jha.. / gacchantūktvā svayaṃ yāsye iti kha.. , cha.. ca
vāñchito hy ahamiti kha.. , cha.. ca
vahnathemiti kha.. , cha.. ca / bahulamiti jha.. :p
vṛddhapramātṛkāmaha iti ka.. , ga.. , cha.. , ja.. ca
varuṇasyātha cendrasyeti ṅa.. / āvasathyasya cendrasyeti cha.. / āvasathyasya sendrasyeti ja..
daśārṇeṣu iti kha.. , ga.. , ṅa.. , cha.. ca
ṣaḍetāstriṣu puṣkarā iti ka.. , kha.. , ṅa.. , cha.. ca
pūrvān saśaktīn sarvāṃśceti ja.. , ña.. ca :p
bhadraṃ bhadramiti brūyādityādiḥ, kuryāddharmādi nityaśa ity antaḥ pāṭhaḥ jha.. pustake nāsti :p
kundañca karavīrañceti kha.. , gha.. , ja.. ca
parityājyamiti ka.. , ja.. , ṭha.. ca / parityajyeti kha.. , cha.. ca / parigrāhyamiti ṅa..
ahiṃsā prathamaṃ puṣpamityādiḥ, pūjitaḥ parituṣyati ity antaḥ pāṭhaḥ kha.. , ga.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , cha.. , ja.. , ña.. , ṭa.. pustakeṣu nāsti :p
gṛdhrikā ca śucigrīvo iti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ gṛdhrikāśucisugrīvo iti ga, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p
nāmnāmunā tu iti kha, ṅa, cihnitapustkadvayapāṭhaḥ :p
vāmanī iti kha, ga, ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ :p
candramadhyasthite iti kha, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ cakramadhyasthite iti ṅa, cihnitapustakapāṭhaḥ
kuryād dvijanāmāṅkitātmaneti kha.. / kuryān nijanāmāṅkitātmaneti ga..
oṃ āṃ hāṃ ātmatattvavidyātattvāya nama iti ga.. / oṃ āṃ iṃ uṃ vidyātattvaśivatattvābhyāṃ nama iti ḍa.. / oṃ āṃ iṃ ātmavidyātattvāya nama iti kha.. :p
samañca sthāpane vāstuś catustriṃśacchataṃ bhavediti gha.. pustake 'dhikaḥ pāṭhaḥ / catuḥṣaṣṭipado brahmā ity ādiḥ, rajjuvaṃśādi pūrvavat ity antaḥ pāṭho ga.. pustake nāsti :p
kumbhañcānantamantikamiti gha.. , cha.. ca / kumbhañcānantamantimamiti ṅa..
brahmāṇaṃ copavinyasyeti kha.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , cha.. , ca
evaṃ dṛṣṭivale pūrṇāditi cha.. / evaṃ dṛṣṭivale pūrṇeti kha..
khādirāpāṅgapippalā iti kha.. , cha.. , ca / khādirāpāmārkapippalā iti gha.. :p
sārikā kuṣṭhamiti kha.. , cha.. , ca / sāvikaṃ kuṣṭhamiti ja..
dhanadadvipadau iti kha.. / dhanadau dvipadau iti gha.. / dhanadaścāpadau iti ja..
svātmana iti kha.. , gha.. , cha.. , ja.. ca
śivakumbhāstravardhanyāṃ pūjayedasthirāsane iti gha.. , ja.. ca
liṅge vṛddhikarādike iti kha.. / liṅgeṣu dvikarādiṣu iti ga.. / liṅge vṛddhikarādiṣu iti kha.. , gha.. ca
brahmaṇā raktacandanair iti ga.. / brahmaṇā raktajīvakair iti ṅa..

oṃ hāṃ hāṃ oṃ oṃ oṃ bīṃ oṃ bhūṃ bhūṃ vāstumūrtaye nama iti kha.. , cha.. ca / oṃ hāṃ oṃ hāṃ oṃ oṃ vāṃ oṃ bhūṃ hāṃ vāṃ kṣmāmūrtaye nama iti ja.. / gha.. pustake bhūṃ bhūṃ vāṃ iti viśeṣaḥ / oṃ hāṃ hāṃ oṃ oṃ vāṃ oṃ oṃ hūṃ hūṃ vāhyamūrtaye nama iti ṅa.. :p
ardhena cāṣṭamāṃśena sarvasyādhaḥ praveśanam iti ja..
sthaṇḍile sannidhāvapi iti ja.. , jha.. ca
gururvastrāṇītyādiḥ, snānamaṇḍapamityantaḥ pāṭho jha.. pustake nāsti
mṛṣṭimantreṇetyādiḥ dīkṣaṇādividhānata ity antaḥ pāṭho ga.. pustake nāsti
hrīṃ kriyāśaktaye nama iti jha.. / oṃ kriyāśaktaye nama iti gha..
vinyaste praṇavena tu iti kha.. , cha.. , ja.. , jha.. ca / vinyaset praṇavena tu iti ga..
aiṣṭe dārubhava iti gha.. , ja.. ca
rucistavāsti vidhineti kha.. , ṅa.. , cha.. , ja.. ca
brahmāntaiḥ ṣoḍaśāṃtakair iti kha.. , cha.. ca / brahmāntāḥ ṣoḍaśāṃśake iti ga.. , ja.. ca
saumyāsyaṃ dve dve paścātpuromukhamiti kha.. / saumyākhyaṃ dve ca paścādadhomukhamiti jha..
kṛtvāṣṭāṃśair hataṃ tatheti ga.. / kṛtvāṣṭāṅgair hataṃ tatheti gha.. , ja.. ca / kṛtvāṣṭāṃśahatastatheti jha..
dakṣiṇāyāṃ tviti ga.. , gha.. , jha ca
tathaivātra hiraṇmayamiti ga.. / tathaivātha hiraṇmayamiti ja..
dakṣiṇena ca bhāratamiti kha.. / dakṣiṇenaiti bhāratamiti ga.. :p
supte samāgata iti gha.. , ṅa.. , ja.. , jha.. ca
mūrtyā devaikagamyayā iti gha.. , ṅa.. ca :p
svādūdakā dvitriguṇeti kha.. , cha.. ca / svādūdakā tu dviguṇeti gha.. , ja.. ca / svādūdakā tu dviguṇeti ga.. , ṅa.. ca
vāpayet saṃyato 'pi ceti kha.. , cha.. , ja.. ca
mallikāśoketyādiḥ, saubhāgyāṣṭakamagrataḥ ity antaḥ cha.. pustake nāsti :p
catvāri tatra chatrāṇi iti ga, gha, ṅa, cihnitapustakacatuṣṭyapāṭhaḥ :p
kuśatalpe vā hṝdayena viśeṣayet iti kha.. / kuśatalpe ca hṛdayena niveśayet iti ga..
sarvadā muktau devādeve grahe satīti gha.. / sarvadā muktyai bhuktyai daivadine satīti ṅa.. :p
hastādvā daśasopānāditi kha.. / hastān vā daśa sopānāditi kha..
kālaṃ mālākulaṃ raktamiti kha.. , ga.. , ṅa.. , cha.. ca / kālaṃ mālākulaṃ, vyaktamiti ga.. / jvālāmālākulaṃ saktamiti gha.. :p
kuryur nijakumbheṣviti kha.. , gha.. , cha.. , ja.. ca :p
gambhīrā navahāstike iti ga.. / gambhīrā navahastake iti ja..
vyāpyātmakāraṇamiti kha.. / vyāptyā svakāraṇamiti gha.. , ṅa.. ca
rudrāya rudro rudra namostu te iti ṅa.. , ja.. ca
ajñāne ceti gha.. , jha.. ca / aṅkādi ceti ṅa..
oṃ vyāpakeśvarāyeti tattvenābhyantarādine iti kha.. / oṃ vyāpakeśvarāyeti nātyantaśivavācineti gha.. / oṃ vyāpakeśvarāyeti tattvenātyantavādine iti cha.. :p
mūrtimūrtīśvarān liṅge iti kha.. , gha.. , ṅa.. , cha.. ca
tvanyeveśādike gaṇā iti kha.. , cha.. ca
prāgīśe cenduyāmye veti kha.. / prāgāpye cenduyāmye iti cha.. , jha.. ca
tatpiturityādiḥ, prapitāmahādityantaḥ pāṭho jha.. pustake nāsti :p
kuryādvā mārgaśīrṣake iti ṅa.. , ña.. ca :p
ācāryaścāgnimutpādyetyādiḥ dadītāgniṃ samuddharedityantaḥ pāṭho ga.. pustake nāsti
yavasya navabhaktasyetyādiḥ / pādavṛddheṣu sarvata ity antaḥ pāṭho ṅa.. pustake nāsti
prabhārāgetyādiḥ nyasedekaikaśaḥ kramāditi pāṭhaḥ, chapustake nāsti :p
tattvavidbhiriti kha.. , gha.. , cha.. , ja.. ca :p
tato dakṣiṇamānasamiti ga.. , gha.. , ja.. , jha.. ca :p
